<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":800,"height":700,"minWidth":600,"minHeight":650}'>
  <title>3D Photo Carousel</title>

  <script type="myop/types">
// =============================================================================
// MYOP COMPONENT TYPE DEFINITIONS
// =============================================================================

/**
 * Data structure passed to myop_init_interface(data)
 */
interface MyopInitData {
  // Top-level branding
  accountName?: string;
  logos?: string[];
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
  flavor?: string;
  clients?: Array<{ name: string }>;
  social?: {
    instagram?: string;
    twitter?: string;
    facebook?: string;
    www?: string;
    email?: string;
  };

  // Media items
  media: Array<{
    id: number | string;
    type: 'image' | 'videoclip';
    goodResUrl: string;
    midResUrl: string;
    proportions?: number;
    widthApx?: number;
    heightApx?: number;
    dominantColor?: { r: number; g: number; b: number };
    palette?: Array<{ color: { r: number; g: number; b: number }; score?: number }>;
    isHighlighted?: boolean;
    isLarge?: boolean;
    isFavorite?: boolean;
    isInCollection?: boolean;
    likes?: number;
    aiRanking?: number;
    persons?: Array<{
      id: string | number;
      age?: number;
      gender?: string;
      facePosition?: { x1: number; y1: number; x2: number; y2: number };
    }>;
    suggestions?: string[];
    isVendorPhoto?: boolean;
    favoritesCount?: number;
    focalPoint?: { x: number; y: number };
    timestamp?: string;
  }>;

  // Theme colors
  themeColors?: {
    text?: Record<string, string>;
    background?: Record<string, string>;
    button?: Record<string, string>;
    icon?: Record<string, string>;
    border?: Record<string, string>;
    darkOverlay?: Record<string, string>;
    lightOverlay?: Record<string, string>;
    shadow?: Record<string, string>;
  };

  // Theme fonts
  themeFonts?: {
    'FF-1'?: {
      family: string;
      weights?: Record<string, number>;
      sizes?: Record<string, { fontSize: string; lineHeight: string; letterSpacing?: string }>;
    };
    'FF-2'?: {
      family: string;
      weights?: Record<string, number>;
      sizes?: Record<string, { fontSize: string; lineHeight: string; letterSpacing?: string }>;
    };
  };
}

/**
 * Actions and payloads for myop_cta_handler(action, payload)
 */
interface MyopCtaPayloads {
  'filter-changed': { filter: string; customFilter?: object };
  'photo-clicked': { photoId: string | number };
  'social-clicked': { platform: string; url: string };
  'view-mode-changed': { mode: '1d' | '2d' | '3d' | '4d' | '5d' };
  'gesture-detected': { type: string; data: object };
  'insight-generated': { category: string; insight: string };
  'layer-toggled': { layer: string; enabled: boolean };
  'narration-toggled': { enabled: boolean };
  'sound-toggled': { enabled: boolean };
  'autoplay-toggled': { enabled: boolean };
  'person-clicked': { personId: string | number; action: 'filter' | 'details' };
  'color-clicked': { color: { r: number; g: number; b: number }; action: 'filter-similar' };
  'tag-clicked': { tag: string; action: 'filter' };
  'date-clicked': { date: string; action: 'filter-period' };
  'rating-clicked': { minRating: number; action: 'filter' };
  'engagement-clicked': { minLikes: number; action: 'filter' };
  'dimension-clicked': { type: 'portrait' | 'landscape' | 'square'; action: 'filter' };
  'size-requested': {
    width?: number | null;
    height?: number | null;
    minWidth?: number | null;
    maxWidth?: number | null;
    minHeight?: number | null;
    maxHeight?: number | null;
    required?: boolean;
  };
}

// =============================================================================
// DO NOT EDIT BELOW - Standard Myop type declarations
// =============================================================================

declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;

declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(
  action: K,
  payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]
): void;
  </script>

  <style>
    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
    }

    html, body {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      overflow: hidden;
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
    }

    #app-root {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
      color: #fff;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* 3D Carousel Container */
    .carousel-container {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      perspective: 1200px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      position: relative;
    }

    .carousel-3d {
      position: relative;
      width: 500px;
      height: 400px;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    }

    /* Camera rotation for more dynamic view */
    .carousel-container.navigating .carousel-3d {
      transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    }

    .carousel-item {
      position: absolute;
      width: 450px;
      height: 350px;
      left: 50%;
      top: 50%;
      transform-style: preserve-3d;
      transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
      cursor: pointer;
      border-radius: 12px;
      overflow: visible;
      box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    }

    /* Data-driven glow effects */
    .carousel-item.high-ranked {
      box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.4), 0 0 60px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2);
    }

    .carousel-item.has-faces {
      box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(103, 126, 234, 0.4), 0 0 60px rgba(103, 126, 234, 0.2);
    }

    .carousel-item.is-favorite {
      box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.5), 0 0 60px rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.3);
    }

    .carousel-item img,
    .carousel-item video {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 12px;
      display: block;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .carousel-item.active {
      z-index: 100;
    }

    /* Metadata Overlay */
    .metadata-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -80px;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      padding: 16px 20px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 101;
    }

    .carousel-item.active .metadata-overlay {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .metadata-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      align-items: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      font-size: 13px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .metadata-row:last-child {
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .metadata-badge {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      padding: 4px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 11px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .metadata-badge svg {
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      fill: currentColor;
    }

    .metadata-badge.favorite {
      color: #ff6b9d;
    }

    .metadata-badge.ranking {
      color: #ffd93d;
    }

    .metadata-badge.dimensions {
      color: #6bcf7f;
    }

    .metadata-badge.timestamp {
      color: #6eb5ff;
    }

    .faces-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .face-avatar {
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid #fff;
      object-fit: cover;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    }

    .face-placeholder {
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid #fff;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: bold;
    }

    .color-palette {
      display: flex;
      gap: 4px;
    }

    .color-swatch {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.2s ease;
    }

    .color-swatch:hover {
      transform: scale(1.3);
    }

    .suggestions-tags {
      display: flex;
      gap: 6px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .suggestion-tag {
      padding: 3px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
      border-radius: 12px;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: #fff;
    }

    /* Navigation Controls */
    .nav-controls {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 30px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    .nav-button {
      width: 50px;
      height: 50px;
      border: none;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: #fff;
      cursor: pointer;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      font-size: 24px;
    }

    .nav-button:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      transform: scale(1.1);
    }

    .nav-button:active {
      transform: scale(0.95);
    }

    /* Filter Controls */
    .filter-controls {
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 8px;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    .filter-button {
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 20px;
      color: #fff;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 12px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .filter-button:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
    }

    .filter-button.active {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      border-color: #fff;
    }

    /* Photo Counter */
    .photo-counter {
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      left: 20px;
      padding: 12px 20px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    /* Keyboard Hint */
    .keyboard-hint {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 100px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
      text-align: center;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    /* 3D Path visualization */
    .path-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 300px;
      height: 60px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 30px;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    .path-dot {
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      flex-shrink: 0;
      position: relative;
      transition: all 0.4s ease;
    }

    .path-dot.active {
      background: #fff;
      transform: scale(1.5);
      box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    }

    .path-dot.favorite {
      background: #ff6b9d;
    }

    .path-dot.high-ranked {
      background: #ffd93d;
    }

    .path-dot.has-faces {
      background: #677eea;
    }

    /* Data legend */
    .data-legend {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      font-size: 11px;
      z-index: 200;
      max-width: 250px;
    }

    .legend-title {
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      opacity: 0.9;
    }

    .legend-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    .legend-color {
      width: 10px;
      height: 10px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* View Mode Toggle */
    .view-toggle {
      position: fixed;
      top: 20px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: flex !important;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 25px;
      padding: 4px;
      z-index: 9999;
      border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
      visibility: visible !important;
      opacity: 1 !important;
    }

    .view-toggle-btn {
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border: none;
      background: transparent;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 600;
      border-radius: 20px;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .view-toggle-btn:hover {
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
    }

    .view-toggle-btn.active {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      color: #fff;
    }

    .view-toggle-btn svg {
      width: 14px;
      height: 14px;
    }

    /* 2D Grid Mode */
    .grid-2d {
      display: none;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      overflow-y: auto;
      padding: 80px 20px 20px;
    }

    .grid-2d.active {
      display: block;
    }

    .grid-2d-inner {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      gap: 16px;
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .grid-item {
      position: relative;
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 12px;
      overflow: hidden;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    }

    .grid-item:hover {
      transform: scale(1.05);
      z-index: 10;
    }

    .grid-item.is-favorite {
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.4);
    }

    .grid-item.high-ranked {
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.4);
    }

    .grid-item img,
    .grid-item video {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .grid-item-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      padding: 8px;
      background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8));
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
    }

    .grid-item:hover .grid-item-overlay {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .grid-item-badges {
      display: flex;
      gap: 4px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .grid-badge {
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 2px 6px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      border-radius: 10px;
    }

    /* Scaled item for favorites/high-ranked in 2D */
    .grid-item.scaled {
      grid-row: span 1;
    }

    .grid-item.scaled-large {
      transform: scale(1.0);
    }

    .grid-item.scaled-large:hover {
      transform: scale(1.08);
    }

    /* ============================================
       4D MODE STYLES
       ============================================ */

    /* 4D Mode - Enhanced carousel with effects */
    .carousel-container.mode-4d {
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
    }

    .carousel-container.mode-4d .carousel-item.active {
      animation: float-4d 4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes float-4d {
      0%, 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) translateY(0); }
      50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) translateY(-10px); }
    }

    /* 4D Controls Panel */
    .controls-4d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 70px;
      right: 20px;
      width: 260px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 16px;
      z-index: 400;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    }

    .control-4d-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding-bottom: 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    .control-4d-title {
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 700;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    .control-4d-close {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
      border: none;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: #fff;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .control-4d-section {
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .control-4d-section:last-child {
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .control-4d-label {
      font-size: 10px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      opacity: 0.6;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .control-4d-buttons {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .control-4d-btn {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 10px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 10px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .control-4d-btn svg {
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
    }

    .control-4d-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      color: #fff;
    }

    .control-4d-btn.active {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3), rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.3));
      border-color: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
      color: #fff;
    }

    /* Layer Toggles */
    .layer-toggles {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .layer-toggle {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      padding: 8px 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 8px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 12px;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
    }

    .layer-toggle:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    .layer-toggle input {
      display: none;
    }

    .layer-toggle input:checked + .layer-icon {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .layer-toggle input:not(:checked) + .layer-icon {
      opacity: 0.3;
    }

    .layer-toggle input:not(:checked) ~ span:last-child {
      opacity: 0.5;
    }

    .layer-icon {
      font-size: 14px;
      transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
    }

    /* Mood Selector */
    .mood-selector {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .mood-btn {
      padding: 8px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      border-radius: 8px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 11px;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
    }

    .mood-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    .mood-btn.active {
      background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2);
      border-color: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
      color: #fff;
    }

    /* Narration Panel */
    .narration-panel {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 100px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 500px;
      max-width: 90%;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 20px 24px;
      z-index: 350;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      animation: slide-up 0.5s ease;
    }

    @keyframes slide-up {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(20px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
    }

    .narration-avatar {
      width: 50px;
      height: 50px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 24px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      animation: pulse-avatar 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse-avatar {
      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4); }
      50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 15px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0); }
    }

    .narration-text {
      flex: 1;
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
    }

    .narration-progress {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      height: 3px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      border-radius: 0 0 20px 20px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .narration-progress-bar {
      height: 100%;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea, #764ba2);
      width: 0%;
      transition: width 0.3s ease;
    }

    /* 4D Timeline */
    .timeline-4d {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 170px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 600px;
      max-width: 90%;
      height: 60px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 30px;
      padding: 10px 20px;
      z-index: 250;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .timeline-track {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      height: 100%;
      gap: 4px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      scrollbar-width: none;
    }

    .timeline-track::-webkit-scrollbar {
      display: none;
    }

    .timeline-node {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: 2px solid transparent;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      position: relative;
    }

    .timeline-node img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .timeline-node:hover {
      transform: scale(1.2);
      z-index: 10;
    }

    .timeline-node.active {
      border-color: #667eea;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
    }

    .timeline-node-date {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -18px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-size: 8px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
    }

    .timeline-node:hover .timeline-node-date {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    /* Face Detection Overlay */
    .face-overlay-4d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 150;
    }

    .face-box {
      position: absolute;
      border: 2px solid rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.8);
      border-radius: 8px;
      background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.1);
      animation: face-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes face-pulse {
      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4); }
      50% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px 5px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2); }
    }

    .face-label {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -24px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-size: 10px;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    /* Interactive 4D elements */
    .interactive-4d {
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
    }

    .interactive-4d:hover {
      transform: scale(1.1);
      box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6);
    }

    .interactive-4d:active {
      transform: scale(0.95);
    }

    .face-box.interactive-4d {
      pointer-events: auto;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .face-box.interactive-4d:hover {
      border-color: #fff;
      background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
    }

    /* Interactive tooltip */
    .interactive-tooltip {
      position: absolute;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
      color: #fff;
      padding: 8px 12px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: 11px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      z-index: 1000;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
      border: 1px solid rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
    }

    .interactive-tooltip.visible {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .interactive-tooltip::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -6px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      border-left: 6px solid transparent;
      border-right: 6px solid transparent;
      border-top: 6px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
    }

    /* Color swatch interactive */
    .color-swatch.interactive-4d {
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
    }

    .color-swatch.interactive-4d::after {
      content: '🔍';
      position: absolute;
      top: -8px;
      right: -8px;
      font-size: 10px;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.2s;
    }

    .color-swatch.interactive-4d:hover::after {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    /* Tag interactive */
    .suggestion-tag.interactive-4d {
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .suggestion-tag.interactive-4d:hover {
      background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
      transform: scale(1.05);
    }

    /* Metadata badge interactive */
    .metadata-badge.interactive-4d {
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .metadata-badge.interactive-4d:hover {
      background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
      transform: scale(1.05);
    }

    /* Timeline node interactive enhancements */
    .timeline-node.interactive-4d {
      position: relative;
    }

    .timeline-node.interactive-4d::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: -4px;
      border: 2px solid transparent;
      border-radius: 10px;
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }

    .timeline-node.interactive-4d:hover::before {
      border-color: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6);
    }

    /* Detail panel for clicked items */
    .detail-panel-4d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.9);
      width: 400px;
      max-width: 90%;
      max-height: 80%;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 24px;
      z-index: 500;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      border: 1px solid rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
      overflow-y: auto;
    }

    .detail-panel-4d.visible {
      opacity: 1;
      pointer-events: auto;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
    }

    .detail-panel-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding-bottom: 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    .detail-panel-title {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .detail-panel-close {
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      border: none;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      border-radius: 50%;
      color: #fff;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 18px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .detail-panel-close:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    }

    .detail-panel-content {
      font-size: 13px;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .detail-panel-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: 8px;
      margin-top: 12px;
    }

    .detail-panel-thumb {
      aspect-ratio: 1;
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: transform 0.2s;
    }

    .detail-panel-thumb:hover {
      transform: scale(1.05);
    }

    .detail-panel-thumb img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .detail-action-btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3), rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.3));
      border: 1px solid rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
      border-radius: 20px;
      color: #fff;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 12px;
      margin-top: 12px;
      margin-right: 8px;
      transition: all 0.2s;
    }

    .detail-action-btn:hover {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5), rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.5));
    }

    /* Active filter indicator */
    .active-filter-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      top: 70px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.9), rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.9));
      padding: 8px 20px;
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 12px;
      z-index: 350;
      display: none;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .active-filter-indicator.visible {
      display: flex;
    }

    .clear-filter-btn {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      border: none;
      color: #fff;
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 14px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .clear-filter-btn:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    }

    /* ============================================
       5D MODE - AVANT-GARDE REACTIVE EXPERIENCE
       ============================================ */

    .mode-5d {
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #0a0a1a 0%, #000 100%) !important;
    }

    .mode-5d::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.1) 0%, transparent 40%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.1) 0%, transparent 40%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.05) 0%, transparent 60%);
      animation: nebula-shift 20s ease-in-out infinite;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    @keyframes nebula-shift {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
      50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1.1) rotate(5deg); }
    }

    /* Neural Network Canvas */
    .neural-canvas {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 10;
    }

    /* Gesture Trail Canvas */
    .gesture-canvas {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 5;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    /* AI Insights Panel */
    .insights-panel-5d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 80px;
      left: 20px;
      width: 280px;
      max-height: 400px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(10, 10, 30, 0.95), rgba(20, 10, 40, 0.95));
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 20px;
      z-index: 300;
      border: 1px solid rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
      overflow-y: auto;
      box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2);
    }

    .insights-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding-bottom: 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    .insights-title {
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 700;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea, #ec4899);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    }

    .insights-pulse {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      background: #10b981;
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: pulse-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.5); }
      50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 10px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0); }
    }

    .insight-item {
      padding: 12px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border-radius: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      border-left: 3px solid;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .insight-item:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      transform: translateX(5px);
    }

    .insight-item.color { border-color: #ec4899; }
    .insight-item.people { border-color: #667eea; }
    .insight-item.time { border-color: #10b981; }
    .insight-item.quality { border-color: #f59e0b; }
    .insight-item.story { border-color: #8b5cf6; }

    .insight-category {
      font-size: 9px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      opacity: 0.6;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .insight-text {
      font-size: 12px;
      line-height: 1.5;
    }

    .insight-value {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin: 8px 0;
    }

    /* Emotion Reactor */
    .emotion-reactor-5d {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 100px;
      right: 20px;
      width: 120px;
      height: 120px;
      z-index: 300;
    }

    .emotion-ring {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      border: 2px solid rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: ring-rotate 10s linear infinite;
    }

    .emotion-ring::before,
    .emotion-ring::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 10px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.3);
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: ring-rotate 7s linear infinite reverse;
    }

    .emotion-ring::after {
      inset: 20px;
      border-color: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);
      animation-duration: 5s;
    }

    @keyframes ring-rotate {
      to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }

    .emotion-core {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 50px;
      height: 50px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, #667eea, #764ba2);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 24px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
      transition: all 0.5s ease;
    }

    .emotion-label {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -25px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      font-size: 10px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    /* Story Generator Panel */
    .story-panel-5d {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 30px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 600px;
      max-width: 90%;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9), rgba(20, 10, 40, 0.9));
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 24px 30px;
      z-index: 300;
      border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
    }

    .story-text {
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1.8;
      font-style: italic;
      min-height: 60px;
    }

    .story-cursor {
      display: inline-block;
      width: 2px;
      height: 20px;
      background: #8b5cf6;
      margin-left: 2px;
      animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
    }

    @keyframes blink {
      50% { opacity: 0; }
    }

    /* Data Constellation */
    .constellation-5d {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 500;
      overflow: visible;
    }

    .constellation-node {
      position: absolute;
      width: 60px !important;
      height: 60px !important;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: transparent !important;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6);
      transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, width 0.4s ease, height 0.4s ease;
      pointer-events: auto;
      cursor: grab;
      overflow: visible;
      border: 3px solid #667eea;
    }

    .constellation-node img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 50%;
      transition: filter 0.3s ease;
    }

    .constellation-node:hover {
      transform: scale(1.3);
      z-index: 600;
      box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.9), 0 0 60px rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.5);
    }

    .constellation-node:hover img {
      filter: brightness(1.2) saturate(1.3);
    }

    .constellation-node:active {
      cursor: grabbing;
      transform: scale(1.4);
    }

    .constellation-node.hovered {
      animation: pulse-glow 1s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    .constellation-node.expanded {
      width: 180px !important;
      height: 180px !important;
      z-index: 700;
      border-radius: 20px;
    }

    .constellation-node.expanded img {
      border-radius: 20px;
    }

    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6); }
      50% { box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.8), 0 0 60px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6); }
    }

    /* Info tooltip for constellation nodes */
    .constellation-info {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -80px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      padding: 10px 14px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transition: opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      min-width: 120px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .constellation-node:hover .constellation-info {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-5px);
    }

    .constellation-info .info-title {
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #fff;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .constellation-info .info-stats {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    }

    .constellation-info .info-hint {
      font-size: 9px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
      margin-top: 6px;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      padding-top: 6px;
    }

    .constellation-line {
      position: absolute;
      height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent);
      transform-origin: left center;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* Orbit Container */
    .orbit-container-5d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 500px;
      height: 500px;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 450;
    }

    .orbit-ring {
      position: absolute;
      border: 1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      border-radius: 50%;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    }

    .orbit-item {
      position: absolute;
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      overflow: visible;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
      cursor: pointer;
      pointer-events: auto;
      transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
      border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    }

    .orbit-item:hover,
    .orbit-item.orbit-hovered {
      transform: scale(2) !important;
      z-index: 500;
      box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.8), 0 0 50px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6);
      border-color: #ec4899;
    }

    .orbit-item.orbit-clicked {
      animation: orbit-pulse 0.3s ease;
    }

    @keyframes orbit-pulse {
      0% { transform: scale(2); }
      50% { transform: scale(2.5); box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(236, 72, 153, 1); }
      100% { transform: scale(2); }
    }

    .orbit-item img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      border-radius: 50%;
      transition: filter 0.3s ease;
    }

    .orbit-item:hover img {
      filter: brightness(1.2) saturate(1.2);
    }

    /* Orbit tooltip */
    .orbit-tooltip {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -50px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      padding: 6px 10px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      white-space: nowrap;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
      font-size: 10px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 2px;
    }

    .orbit-item:hover .orbit-tooltip {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .orbit-title {
      color: #fff;
      font-weight: 500;
    }

    .orbit-stats {
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
      font-size: 9px;
    }

    /* Input Visualizer */
    .input-visualizer-5d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      width: 200px;
      padding: 15px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 15px;
      z-index: 300;
    }

    .input-wave {
      height: 40px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 3px;
    }

    .input-bar {
      width: 4px;
      height: 10px;
      background: linear-gradient(to top, #667eea, #ec4899);
      border-radius: 2px;
      transition: height 0.1s ease;
    }

    .input-label {
      font-size: 9px;
      text-align: center;
      opacity: 0.6;
      margin-top: 8px;
    }

    /* Stats Dashboard */
    .stats-dashboard-5d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 80px;
      right: 20px;
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
      gap: 10px;
      z-index: 250;
    }

    .stat-card-5d {
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 12px;
      min-width: 100px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .stat-card-5d:hover {
      border-color: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
      transform: scale(1.05);
    }

    .stat-icon {
      font-size: 20px;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .stat-value {
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .stat-label {
      font-size: 9px;
      opacity: 0.6;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* ============================================
       DEEP DIVE FULLSCREEN MODAL
       ============================================ */
    .deep-dive-modal {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 10000;
      display: none;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
    }

    .deep-dive-modal.active {
      display: flex;
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .deep-dive-backdrop {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(10, 10, 30, 0.95) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.98) 100%);
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    }

    .deep-dive-close {
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px;
      right: 20px;
      width: 50px;
      height: 50px;
      border: none;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 28px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
      z-index: 10;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .deep-dive-close:hover {
      background: rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.5);
      transform: rotate(90deg);
    }

    .deep-dive-nav {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      width: 60px;
      height: 100px;
      border: none;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
      font-size: 40px;
      cursor: pointer;
      z-index: 10;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .deep-dive-prev { left: 0; border-radius: 0 20px 20px 0; }
    .deep-dive-next { right: 0; border-radius: 20px 0 0 20px; }

    .deep-dive-nav:hover {
      background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
      color: #fff;
    }

    .deep-dive-container {
      position: relative;
      display: flex;
      width: 100%;
      height: calc(100% - 100px);
      padding: 20px 80px;
      gap: 30px;
      z-index: 5;
    }

    /* Photo Area */
    .deep-dive-photo-area {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      position: relative;
    }

    .deep-dive-photo-wrapper {
      position: relative;
      max-width: 100%;
      max-height: 100%;
    }

    .deep-dive-photo {
      max-width: 100%;
      max-height: 80vh;
      object-fit: contain;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 0 20px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
      animation: photo-reveal 0.8s ease;
    }

    @keyframes photo-reveal {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
    }

    .deep-dive-photo-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      border-radius: 12px;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .deep-dive-aura {
      position: absolute;
      inset: -50px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      opacity: 0.3;
      filter: blur(60px);
      z-index: -1;
      animation: aura-breathe 4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes aura-breathe {
      0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.3; }
      50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.5; }
    }

    /* Sidebar */
    .deep-dive-sidebar {
      width: 380px;
      height: 100%;
      overflow-y: auto;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 16px;
      padding-right: 10px;
    }

    .deep-dive-sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
    .deep-dive-sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    .deep-dive-sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-radius: 2px; }

    .deep-dive-section {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 18px;
      animation: section-fade 0.6s ease backwards;
    }

    .deep-dive-section:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
    .deep-dive-section:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
    .deep-dive-section:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
    .deep-dive-section:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
    .deep-dive-section:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }

    @keyframes section-fade {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(20px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
    }

    .section-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      padding-bottom: 10px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    .section-icon {
      font-size: 18px;
    }

    .section-title {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    }

    /* Soul Reading */
    .soul-reading {
      font-size: 15px;
      line-height: 1.7;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
      font-style: italic;
    }

    /* Emotion Analysis */
    .emotion-analysis {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .emotion-bar {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .emotion-label {
      width: 80px;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    }

    .emotion-track {
      flex: 1;
      height: 6px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      border-radius: 3px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .emotion-fill {
      height: 100%;
      border-radius: 3px;
      transition: width 1s ease;
    }

    .emotion-value {
      width: 35px;
      text-align: right;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    }

    /* Visual DNA */
    .visual-dna {
      display: flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .dna-chip {
      padding: 6px 12px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      border-radius: 20px;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .dna-chip:hover {
      background: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
      transform: scale(1.05);
    }

    .dna-chip.color-chip {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .color-swatch {
      width: 14px;
      height: 14px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    }

    /* Connections */
    .photo-connections {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }

    .connection-thumb {
      width: 50px;
      height: 50px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      border: 2px solid transparent;
    }

    .connection-thumb:hover {
      transform: scale(1.15);
      border-color: #ec4899;
    }

    .connection-thumb img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    /* Story Fragment */
    .story-fragment {
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.8;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
    }

    .story-fragment .highlight {
      color: #ec4899;
      font-weight: 500;
    }

    /* Stats */
    .deep-dive-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 15px;
      padding: 15px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
      border-radius: 12px;
      margin-top: auto;
    }

    .dd-stat {
      flex: 1;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .dd-stat-value {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: 700;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #ec4899);
      -webkit-background-clip: text;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
      background-clip: text;
    }

    .dd-stat-label {
      font-size: 9px;
      color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    /* Timeline */
    .deep-dive-timeline {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 20px;
      left: 80px;
      right: 80px;
      height: 60px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      overflow-x: auto;
      padding: 10px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
      border-radius: 12px;
      z-index: 5;
    }

    .timeline-thumb {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 45px;
      height: 45px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      overflow: hidden;
      cursor: pointer;
      opacity: 0.5;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      border: 2px solid transparent;
    }

    .timeline-thumb:hover {
      opacity: 0.8;
      transform: scale(1.1);
    }

    .timeline-thumb.active {
      opacity: 1;
      border-color: #ec4899;
      transform: scale(1.15);
    }

    .timeline-thumb img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    /* DNA Helix */
    .dna-helix-5d {
      position: absolute;
      left: 10px;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      width: 60px;
      height: 400px;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    .dna-node {
      position: absolute;
      width: 28px !important;
      height: 28px !important;
      border-radius: 50%;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 10px;
      overflow: hidden;
      border: 2px solid #667eea;
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5);
    }

    .dna-node img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }

    .dna-node:hover {
      transform: scale(1.8);
      z-index: 100;
    }

    .dna-connector {
      position: absolute;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5), rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.5));
    }

    /* 5D Mode carousel enhancements */
    .mode-5d .carousel-item {
      transition: all 1s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
    }

    .mode-5d .carousel-item.active {
      animation: breathe-5d 4s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes breathe-5d {
      0%, 100% {
        box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3), 0 0 100px rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.2);
      }
      50% {
        box-shadow: 0 0 80px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5), 0 0 150px rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.3);
      }
    }

    /* Reactive highlight effect */
    .reactive-highlight {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4) 0%, transparent 70%);
      pointer-events: none;
      animation: ripple-out 1s ease-out forwards;
    }

    @keyframes ripple-out {
      from { transform: scale(0); opacity: 1; }
      to { transform: scale(3); opacity: 0; }
    }

    /* ============================================
       1D MODE - RETRO 8-BIT PIXEL ART
       ============================================ */

    @font-face {
      font-family: 'Pixel';
      src: local('Courier New'), local('monospace');
    }

    .retro-container-1d {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: #0a0a0a;
      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
      color: #33ff33;
      overflow: hidden;
      image-rendering: pixelated;
    }

    .crt-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: repeating-linear-gradient(
        0deg,
        rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15),
        rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 1px,
        transparent 1px,
        transparent 2px
      );
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 100;
    }

    .crt-overlay::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 100%);
    }

    .retro-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 10px 20px;
      border-bottom: 2px solid #33ff33;
      background: rgba(0, 50, 0, 0.3);
    }

    .retro-title {
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: bold;
      text-shadow: 0 0 10px #33ff33;
      animation: flicker 0.1s infinite;
    }

    @keyframes flicker {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
      50% { opacity: 0.97; }
    }

    .retro-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 20px;
    }

    .retro-stat {
      font-size: 14px;
      text-shadow: 0 0 5px currentColor;
    }

    .retro-display {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      height: calc(100% - 220px);
      padding: 20px;
      position: relative;
    }

    .ascii-frame {
      background: #000;
      border: 3px solid #33ff33;
      padding: 10px;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(51, 255, 51, 0.3), inset 0 0 20px rgba(51, 255, 51, 0.1);
      max-width: 600px;
      max-height: 400px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .ascii-art {
      font-size: 6px;
      line-height: 6px;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: #33ff33;
      text-shadow: 0 0 2px #33ff33;
      margin: 0;
      white-space: pre;
      font-family: monospace;
    }

    .pixel-canvas {
      display: none;
      border: 3px solid #33ff33;
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(51, 255, 51, 0.3);
      image-rendering: pixelated;
      max-width: 400px;
      max-height: 300px;
    }

    .pixel-canvas.active {
      display: block;
    }

    .ascii-frame.hidden { display: none; }

    .retro-textbox {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 80px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 90%;
      max-width: 600px;
      background: rgba(0, 20, 0, 0.95);
      padding: 10px;
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .textbox-border {
      color: #33ff33;
      font-size: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .textbox-content {
      padding: 10px 20px;
      min-height: 60px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      color: #fff;
      text-shadow: 0 0 5px #33ff33;
    }

    .textbox-prompt {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: #ffff33;
      animation: blink 1s step-end infinite;
      margin-top: 5px;
    }

    .retro-menu {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 20px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: flex;
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .retro-btn {
      background: #001100;
      border: 2px solid #33ff33;
      color: #33ff33;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
      font-size: 12px;
      cursor: pointer;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: all 0.1s;
    }

    .retro-btn:hover {
      background: #33ff33;
      color: #000;
      box-shadow: 0 0 15px #33ff33;
    }

    .retro-btn:active {
      transform: scale(0.95);
    }

    .retro-photobar {
      position: absolute;
      top: 60px;
      right: 20px;
      background: rgba(0, 20, 0, 0.8);
      border: 1px solid #33ff33;
      padding: 10px;
      font-size: 11px;
    }

    .photobar-item {
      margin-bottom: 5px;
      color: #33ff33;
    }

    .photobar-item span {
      color: #ffff33;
      margin-left: 5px;
    }

    /* Color themes for retro mode */
    .retro-container-1d.theme-amber {
      color: #ffb000;
    }
    .retro-container-1d.theme-amber .retro-header,
    .retro-container-1d.theme-amber .ascii-frame,
    .retro-container-1d.theme-amber .retro-btn {
      border-color: #ffb000;
    }
    .retro-container-1d.theme-amber .ascii-art,
    .retro-container-1d.theme-amber .retro-title {
      color: #ffb000;
      text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ffb000;
    }

    .retro-container-1d.theme-cyan {
      color: #00ffff;
    }
    .retro-container-1d.theme-cyan .retro-header,
    .retro-container-1d.theme-cyan .ascii-frame,
    .retro-container-1d.theme-cyan .retro-btn {
      border-color: #00ffff;
    }
    .retro-container-1d.theme-cyan .ascii-art,
    .retro-container-1d.theme-cyan .retro-title {
      color: #00ffff;
      text-shadow: 0 0 10px #00ffff;
    }

    /* Color Analysis Panel */
    .color-analysis-4d {
      position: absolute;
      top: 70px;
      left: 20px;
      width: 120px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border-radius: 16px;
      padding: 16px;
      z-index: 250;
    }

    .color-wheel {
      width: 88px;
      height: 88px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      margin: 0 auto 12px;
      background: conic-gradient(
        from 0deg,
        red, yellow, lime, aqua, blue, magenta, red
      );
      position: relative;
    }

    .color-wheel::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    .color-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      background: #fff;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid #000;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      transition: all 0.5s ease;
    }

    .color-mood {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 11px;
      opacity: 0.8;
    }

    /* Particles Canvas */
    .particles-canvas {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 50;
    }

    /* Connections SVG */
    .connections-svg {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 60;
    }

    .connection-line {
      stroke: rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3);
      stroke-width: 2;
      fill: none;
      stroke-dasharray: 5, 5;
      animation: dash-flow 1s linear infinite;
    }

    @keyframes dash-flow {
      to { stroke-dashoffset: -10; }
    }

    /* Engagement Heatmap Overlay */
    .heatmap-overlay {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 55;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    .heatmap-spot {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.8) 0%, transparent 70%);
      animation: heatmap-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes heatmap-pulse {
      0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 0.8; }
    }

    /* 4D Photo Story Card */
    .story-card-4d {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -120px;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95), rgba(30, 30, 60, 0.95));
      backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 16px;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
      transform: translateY(10px);
      z-index: 102;
    }

    .carousel-item.active .story-card-4d {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    .story-card-header {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .story-title {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .story-date {
      font-size: 11px;
      opacity: 0.6;
    }

    .story-stats {
      display: flex;
      gap: 16px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .story-stat {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .story-stat-icon {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .story-description {
      font-size: 13px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      opacity: 0.8;
    }

    /* Sound Visualizer */
    .sound-visualizer {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 20px;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      display: flex;
      gap: 3px;
      align-items: flex-end;
      height: 30px;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    .sound-bar {
      width: 4px;
      background: linear-gradient(to top, #667eea, #764ba2);
      border-radius: 2px;
      animation: sound-wave 0.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    }

    @keyframes sound-wave {
      from { height: 5px; }
      to { height: 25px; }
    }

    .sound-bar:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; }
    .sound-bar:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
    .sound-bar:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
    .sound-bar:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
    .sound-bar:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
    .sound-bar:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
    .sound-bar:nth-child(7) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }

    /* 4D Mode active carousel item enhancements */
    .mode-4d .carousel-item.active {
      box-shadow:
        0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
        0 0 100px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3),
        inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    }

    /* Branding Header */
    .branding-header {
      position: absolute;
      top: 70px;
      left: 20px;
      z-index: 200;
      max-width: 280px;
    }

    .brand-logo {
      height: 40px;
      max-width: 150px;
      object-fit: contain;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3));
    }

    .brand-name {
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 700;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    }

    .brand-title {
      font-size: 14px;
      opacity: 0.8;
      margin-bottom: 2px;
    }

    .brand-description {
      font-size: 11px;
      opacity: 0.6;
      line-height: 1.4;
      max-height: 40px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .brand-flavor {
      font-size: 10px;
      font-style: italic;
      opacity: 0.5;
      margin-top: 6px;
    }

    /* Social Links */
    .social-links {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 20px;
      left: 20px;
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    .social-link {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      color: #fff;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
      border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    }

    .social-link:hover {
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
      transform: scale(1.1);
    }

    .social-link svg {
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      fill: currentColor;
    }

    /* Clients ticker */
    .clients-ticker {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 65px;
      left: 20px;
      font-size: 10px;
      opacity: 0.5;
      z-index: 200;
    }

    .clients-ticker span {
      margin-right: 12px;
    }

    /* Likes indicator on photos */
    .likes-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      right: 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.9);
      color: white;
      padding: 4px 8px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      z-index: 10;
    }

    .likes-indicator svg {
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      fill: currentColor;
    }

    /* Focal point indicator */
    .focal-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
      border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
      border-radius: 50%;
      pointer-events: none;
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
      animation: pulse-focal 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse-focal {
      0%, 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
      50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); opacity: 0.4; }
    }

    /* Large photo indicator */
    .large-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      left: 10px;
      background: rgba(103, 126, 234, 0.9);
      color: white;
      padding: 3px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    }

    /* Collection badge */
    .collection-badge {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 10px;
      left: 10px;
      background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.9);
      color: #333;
      padding: 3px 8px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-size: 9px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* Aspect ratio visual effect - portrait vs landscape borders */
    .carousel-item.portrait {
      border-left: 3px solid rgba(147, 112, 219, 0.6);
      border-right: 3px solid rgba(147, 112, 219, 0.6);
    }

    .carousel-item.landscape {
      border-top: 3px solid rgba(64, 224, 208, 0.6);
      border-bottom: 3px solid rgba(64, 224, 208, 0.6);
    }

    .carousel-item.square {
      border: 3px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.4);
    }

    /* Loading State */
    .loading {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 18px;
      z-index: 300;
    }

    .spinner {
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      border-top-color: #fff;
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
      margin: 0 auto 12px;
    }

    @keyframes spin {
      to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }

    /* Responsive adjustments */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .carousel-3d {
        width: 350px;
        height: 300px;
      }

      .carousel-item {
        width: 320px;
        height: 250px;
      }

      .filter-controls {
        top: auto;
        bottom: 100px;
        right: 10px;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 6px;
      }

      .filter-button {
        padding: 6px 12px;
        font-size: 11px;
      }

      .photo-counter {
        top: 10px;
        left: 10px;
        font-size: 12px;
        padding: 8px 14px;
      }

      .path-indicator {
        width: 200px;
        height: 50px;
        top: 10px;
        left: auto;
        right: 10px;
        transform: none;
      }

      .path-dot {
        width: 10px;
        height: 10px;
      }

      .data-legend {
        display: none;
      }

      .keyboard-hint {
        display: none;
      }

      .metadata-overlay {
        bottom: -100px;
        font-size: 11px;
        padding: 12px 14px;
      }

      .metadata-badge {
        font-size: 10px;
        padding: 3px 8px;
      }

      .nav-controls {
        bottom: 20px;
      }

      .nav-button {
        width: 45px;
        height: 45px;
      }
    }
  </style>
</head>
