  <script>
  (function() {
    var currentData = null;
    var filteredMedia = [];
    var currentFilter = 'all';
    var currentIndex = 0;
    var isAnimating = false;
    var dragStartX = 0;
    var isDragging = false;
    var cameraRotationY = 0;
    var cameraRotationX = 0;
    var viewMode = '3d'; // '3d', '2d', or '4d'

    // 4D Mode state
    var is4DMode = false;
    var soundEnabled = true;
    var narrationEnabled = false;
    var autoplayEnabled = true;
    var autoplayInterval = null;
    var currentMood = 'auto';
    var activeLayers = { metadata: true, faces: true, colors: true, timeline: true, heatmap: false, connections: false };
    var particleCtx = null;
    var particles = [];
    var audioContext = null;
    var oscillators = [];

    // Narration texts based on photo data
    var narrationTemplates = [
      'This {type} captures a {mood} moment. {faces}The composition draws the eye to the {focal} of the frame.',
      '{timestamp} - A {mood} scene unfolds. {tags}',
      'With {ranking} quality rating and {likes} engagements, this {type} tells a story of {tags}.',
      '{faces}The color palette evokes {colorMood}, dominated by {dominantColor} tones.',
      'Featured in {collections} collections, this {highlighted}image showcases {tags}.'
    ];

    // Public API: Initialize with data
    window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
      if (!data) return currentData;
      currentData = data;
      applyTheme(data.themeColors, data.themeFonts);
      renderBranding(data);
      renderSocialLinks(data.social);
      renderClients(data.clients);
      initCarousel(data.media || []);
    };

    // Public API: Send events to host
    window.myop_cta_handler = function(action, payload) {
      // Will be overridden by host
    };

    function applyTheme(themeColors, themeFonts) {
      var root = document.getElementById('app-root');
      if (!root) return;

      // Apply gradient background from theme
      if (themeColors && themeColors.background && themeColors.background.primary) {
        root.style.background = 'linear-gradient(135deg, ' +
          themeColors.background.primary + ' 0%, ' +
          (themeColors.background.secondary || themeColors.background.primary) + ' 100%)';
      }

      // Apply text colors
      if (themeColors && themeColors.text) {
        if (themeColors.text.primary) root.style.color = themeColors.text.primary;
      }

      // Apply theme fonts
      if (themeFonts) {
        var ff1 = themeFonts['FF-1'];
        var ff2 = themeFonts['FF-2'];

        if (ff1 && ff1.family) {
          root.style.setProperty('--font-display', ff1.family);
          document.querySelectorAll('.brand-name, .brand-title').forEach(function(el) {
            el.style.fontFamily = ff1.family;
          });
        }
        if (ff2 && ff2.family) {
          root.style.setProperty('--font-body', ff2.family);
          root.style.fontFamily = ff2.family;
        }
      }

      // Apply accent color for interactive elements
      if (themeColors && themeColors.button && themeColors.button.accent) {
        root.style.setProperty('--accent-color', themeColors.button.accent);
      }

      // Apply border colors
      if (themeColors && themeColors.border && themeColors.border.primary) {
        root.style.setProperty('--border-color', themeColors.border.primary);
      }

      // Apply shadow
      if (themeColors && themeColors.shadow && themeColors.shadow.dropShadow) {
        root.style.setProperty('--drop-shadow', themeColors.shadow.dropShadow);
      }
    }

    function renderBranding(data) {
      var header = document.getElementById('branding-header');
      if (!header) return;

      var html = '';

      // Logo
      if (data.logos && data.logos.length > 0) {
        html += '<img class="brand-logo" src="' + data.logos[0] + '" alt="Logo" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">';
      }

      // Account name
      if (data.accountName) {
        html += '<div class="brand-name">' + data.accountName + '</div>';
      }

      // Title
      if (data.title) {
        html += '<div class="brand-title">' + data.title + '</div>';
      }

      // Description
      if (data.description) {
        html += '<div class="brand-description">' + data.description + '</div>';
      }

      // Flavor text
      if (data.flavor) {
        html += '<div class="brand-flavor">"' + data.flavor + '"</div>';
      }

      if (html) {
        header.innerHTML = html;
        header.style.display = 'block';
      }
    }

    function renderSocialLinks(social) {
      var container = document.getElementById('social-links');
      if (!container || !social) return;

      var icons = {
        instagram: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/></svg>',
        twitter: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18.244 2.25h3.308l-7.227 8.26 8.502 11.24H16.17l-5.214-6.817L4.99 21.75H1.68l7.73-8.835L1.254 2.25H8.08l4.713 6.231zm-1.161 17.52h1.833L7.084 4.126H5.117z"/></svg>',
        facebook: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M24 12.073c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12s-12 5.373-12 12c0 5.99 4.388 10.954 10.125 11.854v-8.385H7.078v-3.47h3.047V9.43c0-3.007 1.792-4.669 4.533-4.669 1.312 0 2.686.235 2.686.235v2.953H15.83c-1.491 0-1.956.925-1.956 1.874v2.25h3.328l-.532 3.47h-2.796v8.385C19.612 23.027 24 18.062 24 12.073z"/></svg>',
        www: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.486 2 2 6.486 2 12s4.486 10 10 10 10-4.486 10-10S17.514 2 12 2zm7.931 9h-2.764a14.67 14.67 0 0 0-1.792-6.243A8.013 8.013 0 0 1 19.931 11zM12.53 4.027c1.035 1.364 2.427 3.78 2.627 6.973H9.03c.139-2.596.994-5.028 2.451-6.974.172-.01.344-.026.519-.026.179 0 .354.016.53.027zm-3.842.511C7.513 6.449 6.706 8.525 6.472 11H3.707a8.013 8.013 0 0 1 4.981-6.462zM3.707 13h2.765c.234 2.475 1.041 4.551 2.216 6.462A8.013 8.013 0 0 1 3.707 13zm7.775 6.973c-1.456-1.946-2.312-4.378-2.451-6.973h6.127c-.2 3.193-1.592 5.609-2.627 6.973-.176.011-.351.027-.531.027-.175 0-.347-.016-.518-.027zm4.83-.511c1.175-1.911 1.982-3.987 2.216-6.462h2.765a8.013 8.013 0 0 1-4.981 6.462z"/></svg>',
        email: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 4H4c-1.1 0-1.99.9-1.99 2L2 18c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h16c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V6c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm0 4l-8 5-8-5V6l8 5 8-5v2z"/></svg>'
      };

      var html = '';
      Object.keys(social).forEach(function(platform) {
        var url = social[platform];
        if (!url) return;

        var icon = icons[platform] || icons.www;
        var href = platform === 'email' ? 'mailto:' + url : url;

        html += '<a class="social-link" href="' + href + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="' + platform + '" data-platform="' + platform + '">' + icon + '</a>';
      });

      if (html) {
        container.innerHTML = html;
        container.style.display = 'flex';

        // Add click handlers
        container.querySelectorAll('.social-link').forEach(function(link) {
          link.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            window.myop_cta_handler('social-clicked', {
              platform: link.dataset.platform,
              url: link.href
            });
          });
        });
      }
    }

    function renderClients(clients) {
      var container = document.getElementById('clients-ticker');
      if (!container || !clients || clients.length === 0) return;

      var html = '<span>Featured: </span>';
      clients.forEach(function(client) {
        html += '<span>' + client.name + '</span>';
      });

      container.innerHTML = html;
      container.style.display = 'block';
    }

    function initCarousel(media) {
      if (!media || !media.length) return;

      filteredMedia = media.slice();
      currentIndex = 0;

      hideLoading();
      renderCarousel();
      render2DGrid();
      setupEventListeners();
      setupViewToggle();
    }

    function hideLoading() {
      var loading = document.getElementById('loading');
      var container = document.getElementById('carousel-container');
      var counter = document.getElementById('photo-counter');
      var pathIndicator = document.getElementById('path-indicator');
      var filters = document.getElementById('filter-controls');
      var nav = document.getElementById('nav-controls');
      var hint = document.getElementById('keyboard-hint');
      var legend = document.getElementById('data-legend');

      if (loading) loading.style.display = 'none';
      if (container) container.style.display = 'flex';
      if (counter) counter.style.display = 'block';
      if (pathIndicator) pathIndicator.style.display = 'flex';
      if (filters) filters.style.display = 'flex';
      if (nav) nav.style.display = 'flex';
      if (hint) hint.style.display = 'block';
      if (legend) legend.style.display = 'block';
    }

    function renderCarousel() {
      var carousel = document.getElementById('carousel-3d');
      if (!carousel) return;

      carousel.innerHTML = '';

      var total = filteredMedia.length;
      document.getElementById('total-count').textContent = total;
      document.getElementById('current-index').textContent = currentIndex + 1;

      if (total === 0) {
        carousel.innerHTML = '<div style="color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-align: center;">No photos match this filter</div>';
        return;
      }

      // Create carousel items
      filteredMedia.forEach(function(item, index) {
        var itemEl = createCarouselItem(item, index);
        carousel.appendChild(itemEl);

        // Bind interactive elements if in 4D mode
        if (is4DMode) {
          var overlay = itemEl.querySelector('.metadata-overlay');
          if (overlay) bindInteractiveElements(overlay, item);
        }
      });

      // Update path indicator
      renderPathIndicator();

      updateCarouselPositions();
    }

    function renderPathIndicator() {
      var pathIndicator = document.getElementById('path-indicator');
      if (!pathIndicator) return;

      pathIndicator.innerHTML = '';

      var maxDots = Math.min(filteredMedia.length, 15); // Show max 15 dots
      var startIdx = Math.max(0, currentIndex - 7);
      var endIdx = Math.min(filteredMedia.length, startIdx + maxDots);

      for (var i = startIdx; i < endIdx; i++) {
        var item = filteredMedia[i];
        var dot = document.createElement('div');
        dot.className = 'path-dot';

        if (i === currentIndex) {
          dot.classList.add('active');
        }
        if (item.isFavorite) {
          dot.classList.add('favorite');
        } else if (item.aiRanking >= 8) {
          dot.classList.add('high-ranked');
        } else if (item.persons && item.persons.length > 0) {
          dot.classList.add('has-faces');
        }

        dot.title = 'Photo ' + (i + 1);
        pathIndicator.appendChild(dot);
      }
    }

    function createCarouselItem(item, index) {
      var itemEl = document.createElement('div');
      itemEl.className = 'carousel-item';
      itemEl.dataset.index = index;

      // Add data-driven CSS classes for visual effects
      if (item.aiRanking >= 8) {
        itemEl.classList.add('high-ranked');
      }
      if (item.persons && item.persons.length > 0) {
        itemEl.classList.add('has-faces');
      }
      if (item.isFavorite) {
        itemEl.classList.add('is-favorite');
      }

      // Proportions-based styling (portrait/landscape/square)
      var proportions = item.proportions || (item.widthApx && item.heightApx ? item.widthApx / item.heightApx : 1);
      if (proportions < 0.9) {
        itemEl.classList.add('portrait');
      } else if (proportions > 1.1) {
        itemEl.classList.add('landscape');
      } else {
        itemEl.classList.add('square');
      }

      // Create media element
      var mediaEl;
      if (item.type === 'videoclip') {
        mediaEl = document.createElement('video');
        mediaEl.src = item.goodResUrl || item.midResUrl;
        mediaEl.muted = true;
        mediaEl.loop = true;
        mediaEl.playsInline = true;
        if (index === currentIndex) mediaEl.autoplay = true;
      } else {
        mediaEl = document.createElement('img');
        mediaEl.src = item.goodResUrl || item.midResUrl;
        mediaEl.alt = 'Photo ' + (index + 1);

        // Apply focal point to object-position
        if (item.focalPoint) {
          mediaEl.style.objectPosition = (item.focalPoint.x * 100) + '% ' + (item.focalPoint.y * 100) + '%';
        }
      }

      // Set background color from dominant color
      if (item.dominantColor) {
        itemEl.style.backgroundColor = 'rgb(' + item.dominantColor.r + ',' +
          item.dominantColor.g + ',' + item.dominantColor.b + ')';
      }

      itemEl.appendChild(mediaEl);

      // Likes indicator
      if (item.likes && item.likes > 0) {
        var likesEl = document.createElement('div');
        likesEl.className = 'likes-indicator';
        likesEl.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/></svg>' + item.likes;
        itemEl.appendChild(likesEl);
      }

      // Large photo indicator
      if (item.isLarge) {
        var largeEl = document.createElement('div');
        largeEl.className = 'large-indicator';
        largeEl.textContent = 'FEATURED';
        itemEl.appendChild(largeEl);
      }

      // Collection badge with count
      if (item.isInCollection && item.favoritesCount > 0) {
        var collectionEl = document.createElement('div');
        collectionEl.className = 'collection-badge';
        collectionEl.textContent = 'In ' + item.favoritesCount + ' collection' + (item.favoritesCount > 1 ? 's' : '');
        itemEl.appendChild(collectionEl);
      }

      // Focal point indicator (visual dot)
      if (item.focalPoint) {
        var focalEl = document.createElement('div');
        focalEl.className = 'focal-indicator';
        focalEl.style.left = (item.focalPoint.x * 100) + '%';
        focalEl.style.top = (item.focalPoint.y * 100) + '%';
        itemEl.appendChild(focalEl);
      }

      // Create metadata overlay
      var overlay = createMetadataOverlay(item);
      itemEl.appendChild(overlay);

      // Click handler
      itemEl.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!isDragging) {
          window.myop_cta_handler('photo-clicked', { photoId: item.id });
        }
      });

      // Double-click to open Deep Dive
      itemEl.addEventListener('dblclick', function(e) {
        e.stopPropagation();
        openPhotoDeepDive(index);
      });

      // Bind interactive 4D elements in overlay
      if (is4DMode) {
        bindInteractiveElements(overlay, item);
      }

      return itemEl;
    }

    function bindInteractiveElements(container, item) {
      container.querySelectorAll('.interactive-4d').forEach(function(el) {
        el.style.pointerEvents = 'auto';

        el.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          var action = el.dataset.action;

          switch (action) {
            case 'likes':
              onLikesClick(parseInt(el.dataset.likes));
              break;
            case 'rating':
              onRatingClick(parseInt(el.dataset.rating));
              break;
            case 'dimension':
              onDimensionClick(el.dataset.dimension);
              break;
            case 'date':
              onDateClick(el.dataset.timestamp);
              break;
            case 'tag':
              onTagClick(el.dataset.tag);
              break;
            case 'color':
              onColorClick({
                r: parseInt(el.dataset.r),
                g: parseInt(el.dataset.g),
                b: parseInt(el.dataset.b)
              }, e);
              break;
            case 'person':
              onPersonClick(el.dataset.personId, {
                age: el.dataset.age,
                gender: el.dataset.gender
              });
              break;
          }
        });

        // Tooltips
        el.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(e) {
          var tooltipText = getTooltipText(el.dataset.action);
          if (tooltipText) showTooltip(tooltipText, e.clientX, e.clientY);
        });

        el.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideTooltip);
      });
    }

    function getTooltipText(action) {
      var texts = {
        likes: 'Click to see most liked photos',
        rating: 'Click to filter by quality rating',
        dimension: 'Click to filter by aspect ratio',
        date: 'Click to see photos from this period',
        tag: 'Click to filter by this tag',
        color: 'Click to find similar colors',
        person: 'Click to see all photos with this person'
      };
      return texts[action] || 'Click for more';
    }

    function createMetadataOverlay(item) {
      var overlay = document.createElement('div');
      overlay.className = 'metadata-overlay';

      var html = '';

      // Row 1: Status badges
      var badges = [];

      if (item.isFavorite) {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge favorite"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/></svg> Favorite</span>');
      }

      if (item.likes > 0) {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge favorite interactive-4d" data-action="likes" data-likes="' + item.likes + '"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 21.35l-1.45-1.32C5.4 15.36 2 12.28 2 8.5 2 5.42 4.42 3 7.5 3c1.74 0 3.41.81 4.5 2.09C13.09 3.81 14.76 3 16.5 3 19.58 3 22 5.42 22 8.5c0 3.78-3.4 6.86-8.55 11.54L12 21.35z"/></svg> ' + item.likes + ' likes</span>');
      }

      if (item.aiRanking > 0) {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge ranking interactive-4d" data-action="rating" data-rating="' + item.aiRanking + '"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 17.27L18.18 21l-1.64-7.03L22 9.24l-7.19-.61L12 2 9.19 8.63 2 9.24l5.46 4.73L5.82 21z"/></svg> ' + item.aiRanking + '/10</span>');
      }

      if (item.widthApx && item.heightApx) {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge dimensions">' + item.widthApx + ' × ' + item.heightApx + '</span>');
      }

      // Proportions/aspect ratio badge
      var proportions = item.proportions || (item.widthApx && item.heightApx ? item.widthApx / item.heightApx : null);
      if (proportions) {
        var aspectType = proportions < 0.9 ? 'portrait' : (proportions > 1.1 ? 'landscape' : 'square');
        var aspectLabel = proportions < 0.9 ? '📱 Portrait' : (proportions > 1.1 ? '🖼 Landscape' : '⬜ Square');
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge interactive-4d" data-action="dimension" data-dimension="' + aspectType + '">' + aspectLabel + '</span>');
      }

      if (item.timestamp) {
        var date = formatTimestamp(item.timestamp);
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge timestamp interactive-4d" data-action="date" data-timestamp="' + item.timestamp + '"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M11.99 2C6.47 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.47 10 9.99 10C17.52 22 22 17.52 22 12S17.52 2 11.99 2zM12 20c-4.42 0-8-3.58-8-8s3.58-8 8-8 8 3.58 8 8-3.58 8-8 8zm.5-13H11v6l5.25 3.15.75-1.23-4.5-2.67z"/></svg> ' + date + '</span>');
      }

      if (item.type === 'videoclip') {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge">📹 Video</span>');
      }

      if (item.isLarge) {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge" style="background: rgba(103,126,234,0.3); color: #a8b8ff;">⭐ Featured</span>');
      }

      if (item.isHighlighted) {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge" style="background: rgba(255,215,0,0.3); color: #ffd93d;">✨ Highlighted</span>');
      }

      if (item.isVendorPhoto) {
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge">🏢 Vendor</span>');
      }

      if (item.isInCollection) {
        var collectionText = item.favoritesCount > 0 ? '📁 In ' + item.favoritesCount + ' collection' + (item.favoritesCount > 1 ? 's' : '') : '📁 Collection';
        badges.push('<span class="metadata-badge">' + collectionText + '</span>');
      }

      if (badges.length > 0) {
        html += '<div class="metadata-row">' + badges.join('') + '</div>';
      }

      // Row 2: Faces
      if (item.persons && item.persons.length > 0) {
        html += '<div class="metadata-row"><div class="faces-row">';
        html += '<span style="margin-right: 4px; opacity: 0.7;">Faces:</span>';

        var maxFaces = Math.min(item.persons.length, 5);
        for (var i = 0; i < maxFaces; i++) {
          var person = item.persons[i];
          var info = 'Age: ' + (person.age || 'unknown') + ', Gender: ' + (person.gender || 'unknown');
          html += '<div class="face-placeholder" title="' + info + '">P' + (i+1) + '</div>';
        }

        if (item.persons.length > 5) {
          html += '<span style="margin-left: 4px;">+' + (item.persons.length - 5) + '</span>';
        }
        html += '</div></div>';
      }

      // Row 3: Color palette
      if (item.palette && item.palette.length > 0) {
        html += '<div class="metadata-row"><span style="opacity: 0.7; margin-right: 8px;">Colors:</span><div class="color-palette">';
        var sorted = item.palette.slice().sort(function(a, b) {
          return (b.score || 0) - (a.score || 0);
        });
        var maxColors = Math.min(sorted.length, 6);
        for (var j = 0; j < maxColors; j++) {
          var c = sorted[j].color;
          var colorStr = 'rgb(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ')';
          html += '<div class="color-swatch interactive-4d" data-action="color" data-r="' + c.r + '" data-g="' + c.g + '" data-b="' + c.b + '" style="background-color: ' + colorStr + '" title="Click to find similar colors"></div>';
        }
        html += '</div></div>';
      }

      // Row 4: Dominant color
      if (item.dominantColor) {
        var dc = item.dominantColor;
        var dcStr = 'rgb(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ')';
        html += '<div class="metadata-row"><span style="opacity: 0.7;">Dominant:</span> <div class="color-swatch" style="background-color: ' + dcStr + '" title="' + dcStr + '"></div></div>';
      }

      // Row 5: AI suggestions
      if (item.suggestions && item.suggestions.length > 0) {
        html += '<div class="metadata-row"><span style="opacity: 0.7; margin-right: 8px;">Tags:</span><div class="suggestions-tags">';
        item.suggestions.forEach(function(tag) {
          html += '<span class="suggestion-tag interactive-4d" data-action="tag" data-tag="' + tag + '">#' + tag + '</span>';
        });
        html += '</div></div>';
      }

      // Row 6: Focal point info
      if (item.focalPoint) {
        html += '<div class="metadata-row"><span style="opacity: 0.7;">Focal point:</span> <span style="color: #6bcf7f;">(' +
          Math.round(item.focalPoint.x * 100) + '%, ' + Math.round(item.focalPoint.y * 100) + '%)</span></div>';
      }

      overlay.innerHTML = html;
      return overlay;
    }

    function formatTimestamp(timestamp) {
      try {
        var date = new Date(timestamp);
        return date.toLocaleDateString() + ' ' + date.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit'});
      } catch(e) {
        return timestamp;
      }
    }

    function updateCarouselPositions() {
      var items = document.querySelectorAll('.carousel-item');
      var total = items.length;
      if (total === 0) return;

      // Update camera rotation based on current photo's position
      var currentItem = filteredMedia[currentIndex];
      if (currentItem) {
        var targetRotY = calculateCameraRotation(currentItem, currentIndex);
        var targetRotX = (currentItem.aiRanking || 5) - 5; // Tilt camera based on ranking
        cameraRotationY += (targetRotY - cameraRotationY) * 0.3;
        cameraRotationX += (targetRotX - cameraRotationX) * 0.3;
      }

      // Apply camera transformation to carousel
      var carousel = document.getElementById('carousel-3d');
      carousel.style.transform = 'rotateX(' + cameraRotationX + 'deg) rotateY(' + cameraRotationY + 'deg)';

      items.forEach(function(item, index) {
        var mediaItem = filteredMedia[index];
        var offset = index - currentIndex;

        // Data-driven positioning
        var pos = calculateDataDrivenPosition(mediaItem, index, offset, total);

        // Calculate distance from camera for scaling
        var distance = Math.sqrt(pos.x * pos.x + pos.y * pos.y + pos.z * pos.z);
        var scale = Math.max(0.3, 1 - distance / 1500);

        // Calculate rotation to face the camera with some variation
        var rotateY = pos.rotateY - cameraRotationY;
        var rotateX = pos.rotateX - cameraRotationX;
        var rotateZ = pos.rotateZ;

        item.style.transform = 'translate(-50%, -50%) translate3d(' +
          pos.x + 'px, ' + pos.y + 'px, ' + pos.z + 'px) ' +
          'rotateY(' + rotateY + 'deg) rotateX(' + rotateX + 'deg) rotateZ(' + rotateZ + 'deg) ' +
          'scale(' + scale + ')';

        item.style.opacity = scale;
        item.style.zIndex = Math.round(scale * 100);

        // Mark active item
        if (index === currentIndex) {
          item.classList.add('active');
          var video = item.querySelector('video');
          if (video) video.play();
        } else {
          item.classList.remove('active');
          var video = item.querySelector('video');
          if (video) video.pause();
        }
      });

      document.getElementById('current-index').textContent = currentIndex + 1;

      // Update path indicator
      updatePathIndicator();
    }

    function updatePathIndicator() {
      var dots = document.querySelectorAll('.path-dot');
      dots.forEach(function(dot, idx) {
        var maxDots = Math.min(filteredMedia.length, 15);
        var startIdx = Math.max(0, currentIndex - 7);
        var actualIdx = startIdx + idx;

        dot.classList.toggle('active', actualIdx === currentIndex);
      });
    }

    function calculateCameraRotation(item, index) {
      // Camera follows the path, looking ahead slightly
      var colorTemp = getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor);
      var faceCount = (item.persons && item.persons.length) || 0;

      // Rotate camera based on where photos are positioned
      var baseRotation = (colorTemp - 0.5) * 20;
      var faceRotation = Math.sin(index * 0.5) * (faceCount * 5);

      return baseRotation + faceRotation;
    }

    function calculateDataDrivenPosition(item, index, offset, total) {
      // Base path progression (flowing forward)
      var progress = offset * 380; // Distance between photos along path

      // Extract ALL data attributes
      var ranking = item.aiRanking || 5;
      var faceCount = (item.persons && item.persons.length) || 0;
      var isFavorite = item.isFavorite ? 1 : 0;
      var colorTemp = getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor);
      var hasMultipleFaces = faceCount > 2 ? 1 : 0;
      var isHighRanked = ranking >= 8 ? 1 : 0;

      // NEW: Additional data attributes
      var likes = item.likes || 0;
      var isLarge = item.isLarge ? 1 : 0;
      var isHighlighted = item.isHighlighted ? 1 : 0;
      var favoritesCount = item.favoritesCount || 0;
      var proportions = item.proportions || (item.widthApx && item.heightApx ? item.widthApx / item.heightApx : 1);
      var focalX = item.focalPoint ? item.focalPoint.x - 0.5 : 0; // -0.5 to 0.5
      var focalY = item.focalPoint ? item.focalPoint.y - 0.5 : 0;

      // Create organic path curves based on cumulative data
      var pathCurve = index * 0.4;

      // X-axis: Complex horizontal movement based on multiple factors
      // 1. Color temperature creates left-right drift
      var colorDrift = (colorTemp - 0.5) * 500;
      // 2. Sinusoidal wave with amplitude based on ranking
      var wave = Math.sin(pathCurve) * (100 + ranking * 30);
      // 3. Face count creates lateral clusters
      var faceCluster = faceCount > 0 ? Math.cos(index * 0.3) * (faceCount * 50) : 0;
      // 4. NEW: Proportions affect horizontal spread (wide photos drift right, tall left)
      var proportionsDrift = (proportions - 1) * 150;
      // 5. NEW: Focal point influences drift (off-center focus pulls photo that direction)
      var focalDrift = focalX * 200;
      // 6. NEW: Likes create popularity clusters on the right
      var likesDrift = Math.min(likes, 100) * 2;

      var x = colorDrift + wave + faceCluster + proportionsDrift + focalDrift + likesDrift;

      // Y-axis: Vertical positioning based on quality and importance
      // 1. Base elevation from AI ranking (creates ascending/descending paths)
      var rankingElevation = (ranking - 5) * 50;
      // 2. Vertical wave motion
      var verticalWave = Math.cos(pathCurve * 0.8) * 70;
      // 3. Face-detected photos rise in groups
      var faceElevation = faceCount > 0 ? faceCount * 35 : 0;
      // 4. Favorites get significant lift
      var favoriteBoost = isFavorite ? 150 : 0;
      // 5. High ranked photos create peaks
      var rankingPeak = isHighRanked ? Math.sin(index * 0.2) * 80 : 0;
      // 6. NEW: isLarge photos rise prominently
      var largeBoost = isLarge ? 180 : 0;
      // 7. NEW: Highlighted photos get extra elevation
      var highlightBoost = isHighlighted ? 120 : 0;
      // 8. NEW: Focal point Y affects vertical position (top-focused = rises)
      var focalVertical = -focalY * 150;
      // 9. NEW: FavoritesCount creates tiered elevation
      var collectionTier = favoritesCount * 40;
      // 10. NEW: Likes create upward momentum
      var likesLift = Math.min(likes, 50) * 1.5;

      var y = rankingElevation + verticalWave + faceElevation + favoriteBoost + rankingPeak +
              largeBoost + highlightBoost + focalVertical + collectionTier + likesLift;

      // Z-axis: Main progression with dynamic depth variation
      // 1. Base forward progression
      var z = progress;
      // 2. Create depth pockets for photo groups
      var depthWave = Math.sin(index * 0.5) * 100;
      // 3. High-quality photos pull slightly forward
      var qualityPull = isHighRanked ? -80 : 0;
      // 4. Multiple faces create depth clusters
      var faceDepth = hasMultipleFaces ? -120 : 0;
      // 5. NEW: Large/featured photos come forward dramatically
      var largePull = isLarge ? -150 : 0;
      // 6. NEW: Highlighted photos emerge from the timeline
      var highlightPull = isHighlighted ? -100 : 0;
      // 7. NEW: Liked photos step forward (engagement = prominence)
      var likesPull = -Math.min(likes, 30) * 3;
      // 8. NEW: Portrait photos create depth layers (staggered)
      var portraitDepth = proportions < 0.9 ? Math.sin(index) * 80 : 0;

      z += depthWave + qualityPull + faceDepth + largePull + highlightPull + likesPull + portraitDepth;

      // Add helix/spiral effect for photos with people (creates DNA-like structure)
      if (faceCount > 0) {
        var helixAngle = index * 0.6;
        var helixRadius = 80 + (faceCount * 30);
        x += Math.cos(helixAngle) * helixRadius;
        y += Math.sin(helixAngle) * helixRadius;
      }

      // Create "lanes" based on content type
      if (item.type === 'videoclip') {
        x += 100; // Videos drift to the right
      }
      if (item.isVendorPhoto) {
        x -= 100; // Vendor photos drift to the left
      }
      // NEW: Collection photos form a central spine
      if (item.isInCollection) {
        x *= 0.7; // Pull toward center
      }

      // Rotation: Dynamic facing based on position in space
      var rotateY = Math.atan2(x, z) * (180 / Math.PI);
      var rotateX = (ranking - 5) * 4 + Math.sin(pathCurve) * 10; // Tilt varies with quality
      var rotateZ = (colorTemp - 0.5) * 20 + faceCount * 3; // Roll based on color and faces

      // NEW: Focal point influences rotation (photo tilts toward its subject)
      rotateX += focalY * 15;
      rotateZ += focalX * 10;

      // NEW: Proportions affect rotation (portrait photos tilt slightly)
      if (proportions < 0.9) {
        rotateZ += 3;
      } else if (proportions > 1.3) {
        rotateZ -= 2;
      }

      // Active item: bring to center stage
      if (offset === 0) {
        z -= 250;
        x *= 0.2; // Center horizontally
        y *= 0.4; // Reduce vertical offset
        rotateX *= 0.5;
        rotateZ *= 0.3;
      }

      // Nearby items: slight adjustment
      if (Math.abs(offset) === 1) {
        z -= 50;
      }

      return {
        x: x,
        y: y,
        z: z,
        rotateY: rotateY,
        rotateX: rotateX,
        rotateZ: rotateZ
      };
    }

    function getColorTemperature(color) {
      if (!color) return 0.5;

      // Calculate color temperature (0 = cool/blue, 1 = warm/red)
      var r = color.r / 255;
      var g = color.g / 255;
      var b = color.b / 255;

      // Simple warmth calculation
      var warmth = (r - b + 1) / 2;
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, warmth));
    }

    function navigateNext() {
      if (isAnimating || filteredMedia.length === 0) return;
      isAnimating = true;
      currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % filteredMedia.length;
      updateCarouselPositions();
      if (is4DMode) update4DOverlays();
      setTimeout(function() { isAnimating = false; }, 600);
    }

    function navigatePrev() {
      if (isAnimating || filteredMedia.length === 0) return;
      isAnimating = true;
      currentIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + filteredMedia.length) % filteredMedia.length;
      updateCarouselPositions();
      if (is4DMode) update4DOverlays();
      setTimeout(function() { isAnimating = false; }, 600);
    }

    function render2DGrid() {
      var grid = document.getElementById('grid-2d');
      if (!grid) return;

      var html = '<div class="grid-2d-inner">';

      filteredMedia.forEach(function(item, index) {
        var classes = ['grid-item'];
        var isScaled = false;

        // Scale up favorites and high-ranked photos
        if (item.isFavorite) {
          classes.push('is-favorite');
          isScaled = true;
        }
        if (item.aiRanking >= 8) {
          classes.push('high-ranked');
          isScaled = true;
        }
        if (isScaled) {
          classes.push('scaled-large');
        }

        var mediaTag = item.type === 'videoclip'
          ? '<video src="' + (item.goodResUrl || item.midResUrl) + '" muted loop playsinline></video>'
          : '<img src="' + (item.goodResUrl || item.midResUrl) + '" alt="Photo ' + (index + 1) + '">';

        var badges = [];
        if (item.isFavorite) badges.push('<span class="grid-badge" style="color:#ff6b9d;">♥</span>');
        if (item.aiRanking >= 8) badges.push('<span class="grid-badge" style="color:#ffd93d;">★' + item.aiRanking + '</span>');
        if (item.persons && item.persons.length > 0) badges.push('<span class="grid-badge">' + item.persons.length + ' 👤</span>');

        html += '<div class="' + classes.join(' ') + '" data-index="' + index + '" data-id="' + item.id + '">' +
          mediaTag +
          '<div class="grid-item-overlay">' +
            '<div class="grid-item-badges">' + badges.join('') + '</div>' +
          '</div>' +
        '</div>';
      });

      html += '</div>';
      grid.innerHTML = html;

      // Add click handlers
      grid.querySelectorAll('.grid-item').forEach(function(el) {
        el.addEventListener('click', function() {
          var id = el.dataset.id;
          window.myop_cta_handler('photo-clicked', { photoId: id });
        });
        // Double-click for Deep Dive in 2D mode
        el.addEventListener('dblclick', function(e) {
          e.stopPropagation();
          var index = parseInt(el.dataset.index);
          openPhotoDeepDive(index);
        });
      });
    }

    function setupViewToggle() {
      var toggleBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.view-toggle-btn');

      toggleBtns.forEach(function(btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
          var mode = btn.dataset.mode;
          if (mode === viewMode) return;

          var previousMode = viewMode; // Store previous mode before changing
          viewMode = mode;

          // Update button states
          toggleBtns.forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
          btn.classList.add('active');

          // Toggle views
          var carousel = document.getElementById('carousel-container');
          var grid = document.getElementById('grid-2d');
          var nav = document.getElementById('nav-controls');
          var hint = document.getElementById('keyboard-hint');
          var legend = document.getElementById('data-legend');
          var pathIndicator = document.getElementById('path-indicator');

          // Exit previous mode if leaving
          if (previousMode === '1d') {
            exit1DMode();
          }
          if (previousMode === '4d') {
            exit4DMode();
          }
          if (previousMode === '5d') {
            exit5DMode();
          }

          if (mode === '1d') {
            carousel.style.display = 'none';
            grid.classList.remove('active');
            if (nav) nav.style.display = 'none';
            if (hint) hint.style.display = 'none';
            if (legend) legend.style.display = 'none';
            if (pathIndicator) pathIndicator.style.display = 'none';
            enter1DMode();
          } else if (mode === '2d') {
            carousel.style.display = 'none';
            grid.classList.add('active');
            if (nav) nav.style.display = 'none';
            if (hint) hint.style.display = 'none';
            if (legend) legend.style.display = 'none';
            if (pathIndicator) pathIndicator.style.display = 'none';
          } else if (mode === '4d') {
            carousel.style.display = 'flex';
            grid.classList.remove('active');
            if (nav) nav.style.display = 'flex';
            if (hint) hint.style.display = 'none';
            if (legend) legend.style.display = 'none';
            if (pathIndicator) pathIndicator.style.display = 'none';
            enter4DMode();
          } else if (mode === '5d') {
            carousel.style.display = 'flex';
            grid.classList.remove('active');
            if (nav) nav.style.display = 'none'; // 5D uses gesture navigation
            if (hint) hint.style.display = 'none';
            if (legend) legend.style.display = 'none';
            if (pathIndicator) pathIndicator.style.display = 'none';
            enter5DMode();
          } else {
            // 3D mode
            carousel.style.display = 'flex';
            grid.classList.remove('active');
            if (nav) nav.style.display = 'flex';
            if (hint) hint.style.display = 'block';
            if (legend) legend.style.display = 'block';
            if (pathIndicator) pathIndicator.style.display = 'flex';
          }

          window.myop_cta_handler('view-mode-changed', { mode: mode });
        });
      });
    }

    function applyFilter(filter) {
      if (!currentData || !currentData.media) return;

      currentFilter = filter;
      var allMedia = currentData.media;

      switch(filter) {
        case 'favorites':
          filteredMedia = allMedia.filter(function(item) { return item.isFavorite; });
          break;
        case 'liked':
          // Filter photos with likes and sort by most liked
          filteredMedia = allMedia.filter(function(item) { return item.likes > 0; })
            .sort(function(a, b) { return (b.likes || 0) - (a.likes || 0); });
          break;
        case 'faces':
          filteredMedia = allMedia.filter(function(item) {
            return item.persons && item.persons.length > 0;
          });
          break;
        case 'highlights':
          filteredMedia = allMedia.filter(function(item) { return item.isHighlighted; });
          break;
        case 'large':
          // Featured/large photos
          filteredMedia = allMedia.filter(function(item) { return item.isLarge; });
          break;
        case 'collections':
          // Photos in collections, sorted by collection count
          filteredMedia = allMedia.filter(function(item) { return item.isInCollection; })
            .sort(function(a, b) { return (b.favoritesCount || 0) - (a.favoritesCount || 0); });
          break;
        default:
          filteredMedia = allMedia.slice();
      }

      currentIndex = 0;
      renderCarousel();
      render2DGrid();

      window.myop_cta_handler('filter-changed', { filter: filter });
    }

    function setupEventListeners() {
      // Navigation buttons
      document.getElementById('prev-button').addEventListener('click', navigatePrev);
      document.getElementById('next-button').addEventListener('click', navigateNext);

      // Keyboard navigation
      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') {
          navigatePrev();
          e.preventDefault();
        } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') {
          navigateNext();
          e.preventDefault();
        }
      });

      // Mouse drag navigation
      var carousel = document.getElementById('carousel-3d');
      carousel.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
        isDragging = true;
        dragStartX = e.clientX;
      });

      document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
        if (!isDragging) return;
        var diff = e.clientX - dragStartX;
        if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) {
          if (diff > 0) {
            navigatePrev();
          } else {
            navigateNext();
          }
          isDragging = false;
        }
      });

      document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() {
        setTimeout(function() { isDragging = false; }, 100);
      });

      // Touch support
      var touchStartX = 0;
      carousel.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
        touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
      });

      carousel.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {
        var touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].clientX;
        var diff = touchEndX - touchStartX;
        if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) {
          if (diff > 0) {
            navigatePrev();
          } else {
            navigateNext();
          }
        }
      });

      // Filter buttons
      var filterButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-button');
      filterButtons.forEach(function(button) {
        button.addEventListener('click', function() {
          filterButtons.forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
          button.classList.add('active');
          applyFilter(button.dataset.filter);
        });
      });

      // Mouse wheel navigation
      carousel.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (e.deltaY > 0) {
          navigateNext();
        } else {
          navigatePrev();
        }
      }, { passive: false });
    }

    // ============================================
    // 4D MODE FUNCTIONS
    // ============================================

    function enter4DMode() {
      is4DMode = true;
      var container = document.getElementById('carousel-container');
      container.classList.add('mode-4d');

      // Show 4D elements
      show4DElements();

      // Initialize particles
      initParticles();

      // Start ambient sound
      if (soundEnabled) startAmbientSound();

      // Start autoplay
      if (autoplayEnabled) startAutoplay();

      // Update current photo's 4D overlays
      update4DOverlays();

      // Setup 4D controls
      setup4DControls();
    }

    function exit4DMode() {
      is4DMode = false;
      var container = document.getElementById('carousel-container');
      container.classList.remove('mode-4d');

      // Hide 4D elements
      hide4DElements();

      // Stop sounds
      stopAmbientSound();

      // Stop autoplay
      stopAutoplay();

      // Stop particles
      stopParticles();
    }

    function show4DElements() {
      var elements = ['controls-4d', 'timeline-4d', 'color-analysis-4d', 'particles-4d'];
      elements.forEach(function(id) {
        var el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el) el.style.display = 'block';
      });

      if (narrationEnabled) {
        document.getElementById('narration-panel').style.display = 'flex';
      }

      // Render timeline
      renderTimeline4D();
    }

    function hide4DElements() {
      var elements = ['controls-4d', 'narration-panel', 'timeline-4d', 'face-overlay-4d', 'color-analysis-4d', 'particles-4d', 'connections-4d'];
      elements.forEach(function(id) {
        var el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el) el.style.display = 'none';
      });
    }

    function setup4DControls() {
      // Sound toggle
      var btnSound = document.getElementById('btn-sound');
      if (btnSound) {
        btnSound.onclick = function() {
          soundEnabled = !soundEnabled;
          btnSound.classList.toggle('active', soundEnabled);
          if (soundEnabled) startAmbientSound();
          else stopAmbientSound();
          window.myop_cta_handler('sound-toggled', { enabled: soundEnabled });
        };
      }

      // Narration toggle
      var btnNarration = document.getElementById('btn-narration');
      if (btnNarration) {
        btnNarration.onclick = function() {
          narrationEnabled = !narrationEnabled;
          btnNarration.classList.toggle('active', narrationEnabled);
          var panel = document.getElementById('narration-panel');
          if (panel) panel.style.display = narrationEnabled ? 'flex' : 'none';
          if (narrationEnabled) generateNarration();
          window.myop_cta_handler('narration-toggled', { enabled: narrationEnabled });
        };
      }

      // Autoplay toggle
      var btnAutoplay = document.getElementById('btn-autoplay');
      if (btnAutoplay) {
        btnAutoplay.onclick = function() {
          autoplayEnabled = !autoplayEnabled;
          btnAutoplay.classList.toggle('active', autoplayEnabled);
          if (autoplayEnabled) startAutoplay();
          else stopAutoplay();
          window.myop_cta_handler('autoplay-toggled', { enabled: autoplayEnabled });
        };
      }

      // Close button
      var closeBtn = document.getElementById('close-4d-controls');
      if (closeBtn) {
        closeBtn.onclick = function() {
          document.getElementById('controls-4d').style.display = 'none';
        };
      }

      // Layer toggles
      document.querySelectorAll('.layer-toggle input').forEach(function(input) {
        input.onchange = function() {
          var layer = input.dataset.layer;
          activeLayers[layer] = input.checked;
          update4DOverlays();
          window.myop_cta_handler('layer-toggled', { layer: layer, enabled: input.checked });
        };
      });

      // Mood selector
      document.querySelectorAll('.mood-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
        btn.onclick = function() {
          document.querySelectorAll('.mood-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
          btn.classList.add('active');
          currentMood = btn.dataset.mood;
          updateMoodEffects();
        };
      });
    }

    function update4DOverlays() {
      if (!is4DMode || filteredMedia.length === 0) return;

      var item = filteredMedia[currentIndex];

      // Update face overlay
      if (activeLayers.faces) {
        renderFaceOverlay(item);
      } else {
        document.getElementById('face-overlay-4d').innerHTML = '';
      }

      // Update color analysis
      if (activeLayers.colors) {
        updateColorAnalysis(item);
        document.getElementById('color-analysis-4d').style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        document.getElementById('color-analysis-4d').style.display = 'none';
      }

      // Update timeline
      if (activeLayers.timeline) {
        document.getElementById('timeline-4d').style.display = 'block';

      // Update connections

        renderConnections();
      } else {
        document.getElementById('connections-4d').innerHTML = '';
      }

      // Update heatmap
      if (activeLayers.heatmap) {
        renderHeatmap(item);
      }

      // Update narration
      if (narrationEnabled) {
        generateNarration();
      }

      // Update particles based on photo mood
      updateParticlesMood(item);
    }

    function updateColorAnalysis(item) {
      var wheel = document.getElementById('color-wheel');
      var moodEl = document.getElementById('color-mood');
      if (!wheel || !item) return;

      // Clear existing indicators
      wheel.querySelectorAll('.color-indicator').forEach(function(el) { el.remove(); });

      // Add indicators for palette colors
      if (item.palette) {
        item.palette.slice(0, 4).forEach(function(p, i) {
          var c = p.color;
          var hue = rgbToHue(c.r, c.g, c.b);
          var sat = rgbToSaturation(c.r, c.g, c.b);

          var angle = hue * Math.PI / 180;
          var radius = 30 + sat * 14;
          var x = 44 + Math.cos(angle) * radius;
          var y = 44 + Math.sin(angle) * radius;

          var indicator = document.createElement('div');
          indicator.className = 'color-indicator';
          indicator.style.left = x + 'px';
          indicator.style.top = y + 'px';
          indicator.style.background = 'rgb(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ')';
          wheel.appendChild(indicator);
        });
      }

      // Determine color mood
      var colorTemp = getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor);
      var moodText = colorTemp > 0.6 ? 'Warm & Energetic' :
                     colorTemp < 0.4 ? 'Cool & Serene' : 'Balanced & Natural';
      if (moodEl) moodEl.textContent = 'Mood: ' + moodText;
    }

    function rgbToHue(r, g, b) {
      r /= 255; g /= 255; b /= 255;
      var max = Math.max(r, g, b), min = Math.min(r, g, b);
      var h = 0;
      if (max !== min) {
        var d = max - min;
        switch (max) {
          case r: h = ((g - b) / d + (g < b ? 6 : 0)) / 6; break;
          case g: h = ((b - r) / d + 2) / 6; break;
          case b: h = ((r - g) / d + 4) / 6; break;
        }
      }
      return h * 360;
    }

    function rgbToSaturation(r, g, b) {
      r /= 255; g /= 255; b /= 255;
      var max = Math.max(r, g, b), min = Math.min(r, g, b);
      return max === 0 ? 0 : (max - min) / max;
    }

          '<img src="' + (item.midResUrl || item.goodResUrl) + '" alt="">' +

    function updateTimelineHighlight() {

    function renderConnections() {
      var svg = document.getElementById('connections-4d');
      if (!svg) return;

      svg.innerHTML = '';
      svg.style.display = 'block';

      // Draw connections between related photos (same tags, same people, etc.)
      var currentItem = filteredMedia[currentIndex];
      if (!currentItem) return;

      filteredMedia.forEach(function(item, idx) {
        if (idx === currentIndex) return;

        var similarity = calculateSimilarity(currentItem, item);
        if (similarity > 0.3) {
          var line = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'line');
          line.setAttribute('class', 'connection-line');
          line.setAttribute('x1', '50%');
          line.setAttribute('y1', '50%');

          var offsetX = (idx - currentIndex) * 100;
          var offsetY = similarity * 50;
          line.setAttribute('x2', 'calc(50% + ' + offsetX + 'px)');
          line.setAttribute('y2', 'calc(50% + ' + offsetY + 'px)');
          line.style.opacity = similarity;

          svg.appendChild(line);
        }
      });
    }

    function calculateSimilarity(item1, item2) {
      var score = 0;

      // Same people
      if (item1.persons && item2.persons) {
        var ids1 = item1.persons.map(function(p) { return p.id; });
        var ids2 = item2.persons.map(function(p) { return p.id; });
        var common = ids1.filter(function(id) { return ids2.indexOf(id) !== -1; });
        if (common.length > 0) score += 0.4;
      }

      // Similar tags
      if (item1.suggestions && item2.suggestions) {
        var commonTags = item1.suggestions.filter(function(t) { return item2.suggestions.indexOf(t) !== -1; });
        score += commonTags.length * 0.1;
      }

      // Similar colors
      if (item1.dominantColor && item2.dominantColor) {
        var colorDiff = Math.abs(getColorTemperature(item1.dominantColor) - getColorTemperature(item2.dominantColor));
        if (colorDiff < 0.2) score += 0.2;
      }

      return Math.min(1, score);
    }

    function renderHeatmap(item) {
      var existing = document.querySelector('.heatmap-overlay');
      if (existing) existing.remove();

      if (!item.likes && !item.aiRanking) return;

      var overlay = document.createElement('div');
      overlay.className = 'heatmap-overlay';

      var intensity = ((item.likes || 0) / 100 + (item.aiRanking || 5) / 10) / 2;

      // Create heatmap spots based on engagement
      var numSpots = Math.floor(intensity * 5) + 1;
      for (var i = 0; i < numSpots; i++) {
        var spot = document.createElement('div');
        spot.className = 'heatmap-spot';
        spot.style.width = (50 + Math.random() * 100) + 'px';
        spot.style.height = spot.style.width;
        spot.style.left = (10 + Math.random() * 80) + '%';
        spot.style.top = (10 + Math.random() * 80) + '%';
        spot.style.animationDelay = (Math.random() * 2) + 's';
        overlay.appendChild(spot);
      }

      document.getElementById('carousel-container').appendChild(overlay);
    }

    function generateNarration() {
      var item = filteredMedia[currentIndex];
      if (!item) return;

      var text = narrationTemplates[currentIndex % narrationTemplates.length];

      // Replace placeholders
      text = text.replace('{type}', item.type === 'videoclip' ? 'video' : 'photograph');
      text = text.replace('{mood}', getMoodFromItem(item));
      text = text.replace('{faces}', item.persons && item.persons.length > 0 ?
        item.persons.length + ' ' + (item.persons.length === 1 ? 'person appears' : 'people appear') + ' in this scene. ' : '');
      text = text.replace('{focal}', item.focalPoint ?
        (item.focalPoint.y < 0.4 ? 'upper' : item.focalPoint.y > 0.6 ? 'lower' : 'center') : 'center');
      text = text.replace('{timestamp}', item.timestamp ? new Date(item.timestamp).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }) : 'A timeless moment');
      text = text.replace('{tags}', item.suggestions ? item.suggestions.slice(0, 3).join(', ') : 'beauty');
      text = text.replace('{ranking}', item.aiRanking ? item.aiRanking + '/10' : 'high');
      text = text.replace('{likes}', item.likes || 0);
      text = text.replace('{colorMood}', getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor) > 0.5 ? 'warmth and energy' : 'calm and tranquility');
      text = text.replace('{dominantColor}', item.dominantColor ? getColorName(item.dominantColor) : 'natural');
      text = text.replace('{collections}', item.favoritesCount || 'multiple');
      text = text.replace('{highlighted}', item.isHighlighted ? 'highlighted ' : '');

      var narrationText = document.getElementById('narration-text');
      if (narrationText) {
        narrationText.textContent = text;

        // Animate progress bar
        var progressBar = document.getElementById('narration-progress-bar');
        if (progressBar) {
          progressBar.style.width = '0%';
          setTimeout(function() { progressBar.style.width = '100%'; }, 100);
        }
      }
    }

    function getMoodFromItem(item) {
      if (item.suggestions) {
        if (item.suggestions.some(function(t) { return ['celebration', 'party', 'wedding', 'happy'].indexOf(t) !== -1; })) return 'joyful';
        if (item.suggestions.some(function(t) { return ['mountain', 'adventure', 'hiking', 'extreme'].indexOf(t) !== -1; })) return 'adventurous';
        if (item.suggestions.some(function(t) { return ['beach', 'calm', 'peaceful', 'serene'].indexOf(t) !== -1; })) return 'peaceful';
        if (item.suggestions.some(function(t) { return ['night', 'stars', 'moon'].indexOf(t) !== -1; })) return 'mysterious';
      }
      return getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor) > 0.5 ? 'warm' : 'contemplative';
    }

    function getColorName(color) {
      if (!color) return 'natural';
      var temp = getColorTemperature(color);
      var brightness = (color.r + color.g + color.b) / 3 / 255;

      if (brightness > 0.7) return 'bright';
      if (brightness < 0.3) return 'deep';
      if (temp > 0.6) return 'warm golden';
      if (temp < 0.4) return 'cool blue';
      return 'earthy';
    }

    // Particle system
    function initParticles() {
      var canvas = document.getElementById('particles-4d');
      if (!canvas) return;

      canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth;
      canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
      particleCtx = canvas.getContext('2d');

      particles = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
        particles.push({
          x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
          y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
          vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
          vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
          size: Math.random() * 3 + 1,
          alpha: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.2,
          color: 'rgba(102, 126, 234, '
        });
      }

      animateParticles();
    }

    function animateParticles() {
      if (!is4DMode || !particleCtx) return;

      var canvas = document.getElementById('particles-4d');
      particleCtx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      particles.forEach(function(p) {
        p.x += p.vx;
        p.y += p.vy;

        if (p.x < 0) p.x = canvas.width;
        if (p.x > canvas.width) p.x = 0;
        if (p.y < 0) p.y = canvas.height;
        if (p.y > canvas.height) p.y = 0;

        particleCtx.beginPath();
        particleCtx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        particleCtx.fillStyle = p.color + p.alpha + ')';
        particleCtx.fill();
      });

      requestAnimationFrame(animateParticles);
    }

    function stopParticles() {
      particles = [];
      var canvas = document.getElementById('particles-4d');
      if (canvas && particleCtx) {
        particleCtx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      }
    }

    function updateParticlesMood(item) {
      if (!particles.length) return;

      var color = item && item.dominantColor ?
        'rgba(' + item.dominantColor.r + ',' + item.dominantColor.g + ',' + item.dominantColor.b + ',' :
        'rgba(102, 126, 234, ';

      particles.forEach(function(p) {
        p.color = color;
      });
    }

    // Ambient sound
    function startAmbientSound() {
      if (audioContext) return;

      try {
        audioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();

        // Create gentle ambient oscillators
        var frequencies = [220, 277.18, 329.63]; // A minor chord
        oscillators = frequencies.map(function(freq) {
          var osc = audioContext.createOscillator();
          var gain = audioContext.createGain();

          osc.type = 'sine';
          osc.frequency.value = freq;
          gain.gain.value = 0.02; // Very quiet

          osc.connect(gain);
          gain.connect(audioContext.destination);
          osc.start();

          return { osc: osc, gain: gain };
        });

        // Add sound visualizer
        addSoundVisualizer();
      } catch (e) {
        console.log('Audio not supported');
      }
    }

    function stopAmbientSound() {
      if (oscillators.length) {
        oscillators.forEach(function(o) {
          o.osc.stop();
        });
        oscillators = [];
      }
      if (audioContext) {
        audioContext.close();
        audioContext = null;
      }

      var visualizer = document.querySelector('.sound-visualizer');
      if (visualizer) visualizer.remove();
    }

    function addSoundVisualizer() {
      var existing = document.querySelector('.sound-visualizer');
      if (existing) return;

      var visualizer = document.createElement('div');
      visualizer.className = 'sound-visualizer';

      for (var i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
        var bar = document.createElement('div');
        bar.className = 'sound-bar';
        visualizer.appendChild(bar);
      }

      document.getElementById('carousel-container').appendChild(visualizer);
    }

    function updateMoodEffects() {
      // Update particle colors and ambient sound based on mood
      var moodColors = {
        auto: 'rgba(102, 126, 234, ',
        calm: 'rgba(100, 180, 200, ',
        adventure: 'rgba(255, 150, 50, ',
        celebration: 'rgba(255, 100, 150, '
      };

      particles.forEach(function(p) {
        p.color = moodColors[currentMood] || moodColors.auto;
      });

      // Update ambient frequencies
      if (oscillators.length) {
        var moodFreqs = {
          auto: [220, 277.18, 329.63],
          calm: [196, 246.94, 293.66],
          adventure: [261.63, 329.63, 392],
          celebration: [293.66, 369.99, 440]
        };

        var freqs = moodFreqs[currentMood] || moodFreqs.auto;
        oscillators.forEach(function(o, i) {
          o.osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freqs[i], audioContext.currentTime);
        });
      }
    }

    function filterByColor(r, g, b) {
      var targetColor = { r: r, g: g, b: b };
      currentCustomFilter = { type: 'color', color: targetColor };
      filteredMedia = currentData.media.filter(function(m) {
        if (!m.dominantColor) return false;
        return colorDistance(m.dominantColor, targetColor) < 100;
      });
      currentIndex = 0;

      render2DGrid();

        renderTimeline4D();
        update4DOverlays();
      }
      hideDetailPanel();
      showFilterIndicator('🎨 Showing similar colors (' + filteredMedia.length + ')');
    }

    function colorDistance(c1, c2) {
      return Math.sqrt(
        Math.pow(c1.r - c2.r, 2) +
        Math.pow(c1.g - c2.g, 2) +
        Math.pow(c1.b - c2.b, 2)
      );
    }

      setTimeout(function() {

    // ============================================
    // DATA ANALYSIS ENGINE
    // ============================================

    function analyzeCollectionData() {
      if (!currentData || !currentData.media) return null;

      var media = currentData.media;
      var insights = {
        total: media.length,
        favorites: 0,
        totalLikes: 0,
        avgRating: 0,
        peopleCount: 0,
        uniquePeople: new Set(),
        colorProfile: { warm: 0, cool: 0, neutral: 0 },
        timeSpan: { earliest: null, latest: null },
        topTags: {},
        aspectRatios: { portrait: 0, landscape: 0, square: 0 },
        highlights: 0,
        collections: 0,
        avgEngagement: 0,
        dominantMood: 'neutral',
        storyThemes: []
      };

      var totalRating = 0;
      var ratedCount = 0;

      media.forEach(function(item) {
        // Favorites & engagement
        if (item.isFavorite) insights.favorites++;
        if (item.likes) insights.totalLikes += item.likes;
        if (item.isHighlighted) insights.highlights++;
        if (item.isInCollection) insights.collections++;

        // Rating
        if (item.aiRanking) {
          totalRating += item.aiRanking;
          ratedCount++;
        }

        // People
        if (item.persons) {
          insights.peopleCount += item.persons.length;
          item.persons.forEach(function(p) { insights.uniquePeople.add(p.id); });
        }

        // Colors
        if (item.dominantColor) {
          var temp = getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor);
          if (temp > 0.55) insights.colorProfile.warm++;
          else if (temp < 0.45) insights.colorProfile.cool++;
          else insights.colorProfile.neutral++;
        }

        // Time
        if (item.timestamp) {
          var date = new Date(item.timestamp);
          if (!insights.timeSpan.earliest || date < insights.timeSpan.earliest) {
            insights.timeSpan.earliest = date;
          }
          if (!insights.timeSpan.latest || date > insights.timeSpan.latest) {
            insights.timeSpan.latest = date;
          }
        }

        // Tags
        if (item.suggestions) {
          item.suggestions.forEach(function(tag) {
            insights.topTags[tag] = (insights.topTags[tag] || 0) + 1;
          });
        }

        // Aspect ratios
        var p = item.proportions || 1;
        if (p < 0.9) insights.aspectRatios.portrait++;
        else if (p > 1.1) insights.aspectRatios.landscape++;
        else insights.aspectRatios.square++;
      });

      insights.avgRating = ratedCount > 0 ? (totalRating / ratedCount).toFixed(1) : 0;
      insights.avgEngagement = media.length > 0 ? (insights.totalLikes / media.length).toFixed(1) : 0;
      insights.uniquePeopleCount = insights.uniquePeople.size;

      // Sort top tags
      insights.sortedTags = Object.entries(insights.topTags)
        .sort(function(a, b) { return b[1] - a[1]; })
        .slice(0, 10);

      // Determine mood
      if (insights.colorProfile.warm > insights.colorProfile.cool * 1.5) {
        insights.dominantMood = 'energetic';
      } else if (insights.colorProfile.cool > insights.colorProfile.warm * 1.5) {
        insights.dominantMood = 'contemplative';
      } else if (insights.favorites > media.length * 0.3) {
        insights.dominantMood = 'cherished';
      } else {
        insights.dominantMood = 'balanced';
      }

      // Story themes
      if (insights.uniquePeopleCount > 3) insights.storyThemes.push('social gathering');
      if (insights.sortedTags.some(function(t) { return ['nature', 'mountain', 'beach', 'forest'].includes(t[0]); })) {
        insights.storyThemes.push('adventure');
      }
      if (insights.sortedTags.some(function(t) { return ['wedding', 'celebration', 'party'].includes(t[0]); })) {
        insights.storyThemes.push('celebration');
      }
      if (insights.timeSpan.earliest && insights.timeSpan.latest) {
        var daySpan = (insights.timeSpan.latest - insights.timeSpan.earliest) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
        if (daySpan > 30) insights.storyThemes.push('journey through time');
      }

      return insights;
    }

    // ============================================
    // NEURAL NETWORK VISUALIZATION
    // ============================================

    function initNeuralNetwork() {
      var canvas = document.getElementById('neural-canvas-5d');
      if (!canvas) return;
      canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth;
      canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
      neuralCtx = canvas.getContext('2d');

      // Create nodes based on data points
      neuralNodes = [];
      var nodeCount = Math.min(dataInsights.total, 30);
      for (var i = 0; i < nodeCount; i++) {
        neuralNodes.push({
          x: Math.random() * canvas.width,
          y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
          vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
          vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
          radius: 2 + Math.random() * 3,
          color: ['#667eea', '#ec4899', '#10b981', '#f59e0b'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)]
        });
      }

      animateNeuralNetwork();
    }

    function animateNeuralNetwork() {
      if (!is5DMode || !neuralCtx) return;

      var canvas = document.getElementById('neural-canvas-5d');
      neuralCtx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      // Update and draw nodes
      neuralNodes.forEach(function(node, i) {
        node.x += node.vx;
        node.y += node.vy;

        if (node.x < 0 || node.x > canvas.width) node.vx *= -1;
        if (node.y < 0 || node.y > canvas.height) node.vy *= -1;

        // Draw connections
        neuralNodes.forEach(function(other, j) {
          if (i >= j) return;
          var dist = Math.hypot(node.x - other.x, node.y - other.y);
          if (dist < 150) {
            neuralCtx.beginPath();
            neuralCtx.moveTo(node.x, node.y);
            neuralCtx.lineTo(other.x, other.y);
            neuralCtx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(102, 126, 234, ' + (1 - dist / 150) * 0.3 + ')';
            neuralCtx.stroke();
          }
        });

        // Draw node
        neuralCtx.beginPath();
        neuralCtx.arc(node.x, node.y, node.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        neuralCtx.fillStyle = node.color;
        neuralCtx.fill();
      });

      requestAnimationFrame(animateNeuralNetwork);
    }

    // ============================================
    // GESTURE TRAIL & REACTIVITY
    // ============================================

    function initGestureTrail() {
      var canvas = document.getElementById('gesture-canvas-5d');
      if (!canvas) return;
      canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth;
      canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
      gestureCtx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      animateGestureTrail();
    }

    function animateGestureTrail() {
      if (!is5DMode || !gestureCtx) return;

      var canvas = document.getElementById('gesture-canvas-5d');
      gestureCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)';
      gestureCtx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      mouseTrail.forEach(function(point, i) {
        var alpha = point.life / 50;
        gestureCtx.beginPath();
        gestureCtx.arc(point.x, point.y, point.size * alpha, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        gestureCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + point.color + ', ' + alpha + ')';
        gestureCtx.fill();
        point.life--;
      });

      mouseTrail = mouseTrail.filter(function(p) { return p.life > 0; });

      requestAnimationFrame(animateGestureTrail);
    }

    function setup5DReactivity() {
      var container = document.getElementById('app-root');

      // Mouse move - gesture trail
      container.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
        if (!is5DMode) return;
        var item = filteredMedia[currentIndex];
        var color = item && item.dominantColor ?
          item.dominantColor.r + ',' + item.dominantColor.g + ',' + item.dominantColor.b :
          '102, 126, 234';

        mouseTrail.push({
          x: e.clientX,
          y: e.clientY,
          size: 15 + Math.random() * 10,
          life: 50,
          color: color
        });

        // Update input visualizer
        updateInputVisualizer('move', e);

        // Ripple effect
        if (Math.random() > 0.95) {
          createRipple(e.clientX, e.clientY);
        }
      });

      // Click - major reaction
      container.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!is5DMode) return;
        createRipple(e.clientX, e.clientY);
        recordInteraction('click', e);
        updateEmotionFromInteraction('click');
        pulseNeuralNodes(e.clientX, e.clientY);
      });

      // Keyboard - trigger insights
      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (!is5DMode) return;
        recordInteraction('key', e.key);
        updateInputVisualizer('key', e);

        if (e.key === ' ') {
          generateStory();
        } else if (e.key >= '1' && e.key <= '9') {
          var rating = parseInt(e.key);
          filterByRating(rating);
        }
      });

      // Scroll - emotional shift + constellation movement + orbit speed
      container.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
        if (!is5DMode) return;
        e.preventDefault();

        // Update emotion based on scroll direction
        updateEmotionFromInteraction(e.deltaY > 0 ? 'scroll-down' : 'scroll-up');

        // Add momentum to constellation nodes
        scrollMomentum += e.deltaY * 0.02;

        // Rotate orbit rings based on scroll
        orbitAngle += e.deltaY * 0.1;
        var orbitContainer = document.getElementById('orbit-container-5d');
        if (orbitContainer) {
          orbitContainer.style.transform = 'translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(' + orbitAngle + 'deg)';
        }

        // Scale constellation nodes based on scroll intensity
        var scaleFactor = 1 + Math.abs(e.deltaY) * 0.001;
        constellationNodes.forEach(function(nodeData, i) {
          // Push nodes away from center or pull them in
          var centerX = 50;
          var centerY = 50;
          var dx = nodeData.x - centerX;
          var dy = nodeData.y - centerY;

          if (e.deltaY > 0) {
            // Scroll down - expand outward
            nodeData.vx += dx * 0.002;
            nodeData.vy += dy * 0.002;
          } else {
            // Scroll up - contract inward
            nodeData.vx -= dx * 0.002;
            nodeData.vy -= dy * 0.002;
          }

          // Pulse effect on scroll
          nodeData.el.style.transform = 'scale(' + scaleFactor + ')';
          setTimeout(function() {
            if (!nodeData.el.classList.contains('hovered')) {
              nodeData.el.style.transform = '';
            }
          }, 150);
        });

        // Navigate photos with scroll
        if (Math.abs(e.deltaY) > 50) {
          if (e.deltaY > 0) {
            navigateNext();
          } else {
            navigatePrev();
          }
        }
      }, { passive: false });

      // Double click - deep dive
      container.addEventListener('dblclick', function(e) {
        if (!is5DMode) return;
        var item = filteredMedia[currentIndex];
        if (item) showDeepDive(item);
      });
    }

    function createRipple(x, y) {
      var ripple = document.createElement('div');
      ripple.className = 'reactive-highlight';
      ripple.style.left = x + 'px';
      ripple.style.top = y + 'px';
      ripple.style.width = '100px';
      ripple.style.height = '100px';
      document.getElementById('app-root').appendChild(ripple);
      setTimeout(function() { ripple.remove(); }, 1000);
    }

    function pulseNeuralNodes(x, y) {
      neuralNodes.forEach(function(node) {
        var dist = Math.hypot(node.x - x, node.y - y);
        if (dist < 200) {
          var angle = Math.atan2(node.y - y, node.x - x);
          node.vx += Math.cos(angle) * 2;
          node.vy += Math.sin(angle) * 2;
        }
      });
    }

    function recordInteraction(type, data) {
      interactionHistory.push({ type: type, data: data, time: Date.now() });
      if (interactionHistory.length > 100) interactionHistory.shift();
    }

    function updateInputVisualizer(type, e) {
      var wave = document.getElementById('input-wave');
      if (!wave) return;

      var bars = wave.querySelectorAll('.input-bar');
      if (bars.length === 0) {
        for (var i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
          var bar = document.createElement('div');
          bar.className = 'input-bar';
          wave.appendChild(bar);
        }
        bars = wave.querySelectorAll('.input-bar');
      }

      bars.forEach(function(bar) {
        var height = type === 'key' ? 30 : 5 + Math.random() * 25;
        bar.style.height = height + 'px';
      });
    }

      }

    function generateStory() {

        'This collection of ' + dataInsights.total + ' photographs weaves a tale of ' + dataInsights.storyThemes.join(' and ') + '. With ' + dataInsights.uniquePeopleCount + ' unique individuals captured, it speaks of connections and shared moments.',

    function typeWriter(el, text) {
      el.textContent = '';
      var i = 0;
      function type() {
        if (i < text.length && is5DMode) {
          el.textContent += text.charAt(i);
          i++;
          setTimeout(type, 30);
