    // ============================================
    // CONSTELLATION & ORBITS
    // ============================================

    var constellationNodes = [];
    var orbitAngle = 0;
    var scrollMomentum = 0;

    function renderConstellation() {
      var container = document.getElementById('constellation-5d');
      if (!container || !currentData) return;

      container.innerHTML = '';
      constellationNodes = [];
      var media = filteredMedia.slice(0, 20);

      media.forEach(function(item, i) {
        var node = document.createElement('div');
        node.className = 'constellation-node';
        var startX = 10 + Math.random() * 80;
        var startY = 10 + Math.random() * 80;
        node.style.left = startX + '%';
        node.style.top = startY + '%';

        var color = item.dominantColor ?
          'rgb(' + item.dominantColor.r + ',' + item.dominantColor.g + ',' + item.dominantColor.b + ')' : '#667eea';
        var colorRgba = item.dominantColor ?
          'rgba(' + item.dominantColor.r + ',' + item.dominantColor.g + ',' + item.dominantColor.b + ', 0.6)' : 'rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.6)';

        node.style.border = '3px solid ' + color;
        node.style.boxShadow = '0 0 20px ' + colorRgba;

        // Create info tooltip
        var info = document.createElement('div');
        info.className = 'constellation-info';
        info.innerHTML = '<div class="info-title">' + (item.suggestions && item.suggestions[0] ? item.suggestions[0] : 'Photo #' + (i+1)) + '</div>' +
          '<div class="info-stats">' +
          (item.aiRanking ? '⭐ ' + item.aiRanking + '/10 ' : '') +
          (item.likes ? '❤️ ' + item.likes + ' ' : '') +
          (item.persons && item.persons.length ? '👤 ' + item.persons.length : '') +
          '</div>' +
          '<div class="info-hint">Click to focus • Drag to move</div>';

        node.innerHTML = '<img src="' + (item.midResUrl || item.goodResUrl) + '" draggable="false">';
        node.appendChild(info);

        // Store node data for animation
        var nodeData = {
          el: node,
          x: startX,
          y: startY,
          vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.1,
          vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.1,
          baseSize: 50 + (item.aiRanking || 5) * 3,
          item: item,
          dragging: false
        };
        constellationNodes.push(nodeData);

        // Hover effects
        node.onmouseenter = function() {
          node.classList.add('hovered');
          nodeData.vx *= 0.1;
          nodeData.vy *= 0.1;
        };
        node.onmouseleave = function() {
          node.classList.remove('hovered');
        };

        // Click to focus/expand
        node.onclick = function(e) {
          if (nodeData.dragging) return;
          e.stopPropagation();
          show5DPhotoDetail(item, node);
        };

        // Drag to move
        var dragStartX, dragStartY, nodeStartX, nodeStartY;
        node.onmousedown = function(e) {
          e.preventDefault();
          nodeData.dragging = false;
          dragStartX = e.clientX;
          dragStartY = e.clientY;
          nodeStartX = nodeData.x;
          nodeStartY = nodeData.y;

          function onMove(e) {
            var dx = (e.clientX - dragStartX) / container.offsetWidth * 100;
            var dy = (e.clientY - dragStartY) / container.offsetHeight * 100;
            if (Math.abs(dx) > 1 || Math.abs(dy) > 1) nodeData.dragging = true;
            nodeData.x = Math.max(5, Math.min(95, nodeStartX + dx));
            nodeData.y = Math.max(5, Math.min(95, nodeStartY + dy));
            nodeData.vx = dx * 0.01;
            nodeData.vy = dy * 0.01;
            node.style.left = nodeData.x + '%';
            node.style.top = nodeData.y + '%';
          }
          function onUp() {
            document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
            document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
            setTimeout(function() { nodeData.dragging = false; }, 100);
          }
          document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove);
          document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp);
        };

        container.appendChild(node);
      });

      // Start constellation animation
      animateConstellation();
    }

    function animateConstellation() {
      if (!is5DMode) return;

      constellationNodes.forEach(function(nodeData) {
        if (nodeData.dragging) return;

        // Apply velocity with friction
        nodeData.x += nodeData.vx + scrollMomentum * 0.5;
        nodeData.y += nodeData.vy;
        nodeData.vx *= 0.99;
        nodeData.vy *= 0.99;

        // Bounce off edges
        if (nodeData.x < 5 || nodeData.x > 95) nodeData.vx *= -0.8;
        if (nodeData.y < 5 || nodeData.y > 95) nodeData.vy *= -0.8;
        nodeData.x = Math.max(5, Math.min(95, nodeData.x));
        nodeData.y = Math.max(5, Math.min(95, nodeData.y));

        nodeData.el.style.left = nodeData.x + '%';
        nodeData.el.style.top = nodeData.y + '%';
      });

      // Decay scroll momentum
      scrollMomentum *= 0.95;

      requestAnimationFrame(animateConstellation);
    }

    function show5DPhotoDetail(item, node) {
      // Expand the node to show full details
      var existing = document.querySelector('.constellation-node.expanded');
      if (existing) existing.classList.remove('expanded');

      if (node.classList.contains('expanded')) {
        node.classList.remove('expanded');
      } else {
        node.classList.add('expanded');
        // Jump to this photo in carousel
        jumpToPhoto(item.id);
      }
    }

    function renderOrbitRings() {
      var container = document.getElementById('orbit-container-5d');
      if (!container) return;

      container.innerHTML = '';

      // Create orbit rings
      [200, 300, 400].forEach(function(size, ringIdx) {
        var ring = document.createElement('div');
        ring.className = 'orbit-ring';
        ring.style.width = size + 'px';
        ring.style.height = size + 'px';
        container.appendChild(ring);

        // Add orbiting photos
        var photosOnRing = Math.min(filteredMedia.length, 6);
        var startIdx = ringIdx * 6;

        for (var i = 0; i < photosOnRing && startIdx + i < filteredMedia.length; i++) {
          var item = filteredMedia[startIdx + i];
          var angle = (i / photosOnRing) * Math.PI * 2;
          var radius = size / 2;

          var orbitItem = document.createElement('div');
          orbitItem.className = 'orbit-item';
          orbitItem.style.left = (250 + Math.cos(angle) * radius - 20) + 'px';
          orbitItem.style.top = (250 + Math.sin(angle) * radius - 20) + 'px';
          orbitItem.dataset.angle = angle;
          orbitItem.dataset.radius = radius;
          orbitItem.dataset.ring = ringIdx;

          // Create tooltip for orbit item
          var tooltip = document.createElement('div');
          tooltip.className = 'orbit-tooltip';
          tooltip.innerHTML = '<span class="orbit-title">' + (item.suggestions && item.suggestions[0] ? item.suggestions[0] : 'Photo') + '</span>' +
            '<span class="orbit-stats">' + (item.aiRanking ? '⭐' + item.aiRanking : '') + (item.likes ? ' ❤️' + item.likes : '') + '</span>';

          orbitItem.innerHTML = '<img src="' + (item.midResUrl || item.goodResUrl) + '" alt="" draggable="false">';
          orbitItem.appendChild(tooltip);

          // Hover effects
          orbitItem.onmouseenter = function() {
            orbitItem.classList.add('orbit-hovered');
            // Pause orbit animation briefly
            container.style.animationPlayState = 'paused';
          };
          orbitItem.onmouseleave = function() {
            orbitItem.classList.remove('orbit-hovered');
            container.style.animationPlayState = 'running';
          };

          // Click to view
          orbitItem.onclick = (function(itemRef, el) {
            return function(e) {
              e.stopPropagation();
              // Pulse effect
              el.classList.add('orbit-clicked');
              setTimeout(function() { el.classList.remove('orbit-clicked'); }, 300);
              jumpToPhoto(itemRef.id);
            };
          })(item, orbitItem);

          container.appendChild(orbitItem);
        }
      });

      // Start orbit animation
      animateOrbits();
    }

    function animateOrbits() {
      if (!is5DMode) return;

      var container = document.getElementById('orbit-container-5d');
      if (!container) return;

      var items = container.querySelectorAll('.orbit-item');
      items.forEach(function(item) {
        var angle = parseFloat(item.dataset.angle) + 0.002 * (parseInt(item.dataset.ring) + 1);
        var radius = parseFloat(item.dataset.radius);
        item.dataset.angle = angle;
        item.style.left = (250 + Math.cos(angle) * radius - 20) + 'px';
        item.style.top = (250 + Math.sin(angle) * radius - 20) + 'px';
      });

      requestAnimationFrame(animateOrbits);
    }

    function renderDNAHelix() {
      var container = document.getElementById('dna-helix-5d');
      if (!container) return;

      container.innerHTML = '';
      var count = Math.min(filteredMedia.length, 15);

      for (var i = 0; i < count; i++) {

    function renderEmotionalAnalysis(item) {
      var el = document.getElementById('deep-dive-emotions');
      var emotions = analyzeEmotions(item);

      el.innerHTML = emotions.map(function(e) {
        return '<div class="emotion-bar">' +
          '<span class="emotion-label">' + e.name + '</span>' +
          '<div class="emotion-track"><div class="emotion-fill" style="width:' + e.value + '%;background:' + e.color + '"></div></div>' +
          '<span class="emotion-value">' + e.value + '%</span>' +
        '</div>';
      }).join('');
    }

    function analyzeEmotions(item) {
      var emotions = [];
      var temp = item.dominantColor ? getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor) : 0.5;
      var brightness = item.dominantColor ? (item.dominantColor.r + item.dominantColor.g + item.dominantColor.b) / 765 : 0.5;
      var hasPersons = item.persons && item.persons.length > 0;
      var rating = item.aiRanking || 5;

      emotions.push({ name: 'Joy', value: Math.round(temp * 60 + (item.isFavorite ? 25 : 0) + Math.random() * 15), color: '#fbbf24' });
      emotions.push({ name: 'Nostalgia', value: Math.round(50 + (item.timestamp ? 20 : 0) + Math.random() * 20), color: '#a78bfa' });
      emotions.push({ name: 'Serenity', value: Math.round((1 - temp) * 50 + brightness * 30 + Math.random() * 15), color: '#60a5fa' });
      emotions.push({ name: 'Connection', value: Math.round((hasPersons ? 70 : 20) + Math.random() * 20), color: '#ec4899' });
      emotions.push({ name: 'Wonder', value: Math.round(rating * 8 + Math.random() * 20), color: '#34d399' });

      return emotions.sort(function(a, b) { return b.value - a.value; });
    }

    function renderVisualDNA(item) {
      var el = document.getElementById('deep-dive-dna');
      var chips = [];

      // Colors
      if (item.dominantColor) {
        var dc = item.dominantColor;
        chips.push('<span class="dna-chip color-chip"><span class="color-swatch" style="background:rgb(' + dc.r + ',' + dc.g + ',' + dc.b + ')"></span>Dominant</span>');
      }
      if (item.palette && item.palette.length > 0) {
        item.palette.slice(0, 3).forEach(function(c) {
          chips.push('<span class="dna-chip color-chip"><span class="color-swatch" style="background:rgb(' + c.r + ',' + c.g + ',' + c.b + ')"></span>Accent</span>');
        });
      }

      // Properties
      if (item.proportions) chips.push('<span class="dna-chip">📐 ' + item.proportions + '</span>');
      if (item.isLarge) chips.push('<span class="dna-chip">🖼️ High-res</span>');
      if (item.isHighlighted) chips.push('<span class="dna-chip">⭐ Highlighted</span>');
      if (item.isVendorPhoto) chips.push('<span class="dna-chip">📸 Professional</span>');

      // Tags
      if (item.suggestions) {
        item.suggestions.slice(0, 4).forEach(function(tag) {
          chips.push('<span class="dna-chip" onclick="filterByTag(\'' + tag + '\')">#' + tag + '</span>');
        });
      }

      el.innerHTML = chips.join('');
    }

    function renderConnections(item) {
      var el = document.getElementById('deep-dive-connections');
      var connections = findConnections(item);

      if (connections.length === 0) {
        el.innerHTML = '<span style="opacity:0.5;font-size:12px;">No direct connections found</span>';
        return;
      }

      el.innerHTML = connections.slice(0, 8).map(function(conn) {
        return '<div class="connection-thumb" onclick="navigateDeepDive(' + filteredMedia.indexOf(conn) + ')" title="' + (conn.suggestions ? conn.suggestions[0] : 'Connected') + '">' +
          '<img src="' + (conn.midResUrl || conn.goodResUrl) + '">' +
        '</div>';
      }).join('');
    }

    function findConnections(item) {
      return filteredMedia.filter(function(m) {
        if (m.id === item.id) return false;
        // Same person
        if (item.persons && m.persons) {
          var shared = item.persons.filter(function(p) {
            return m.persons.some(function(mp) { return mp.id === p.id; });
          });
          if (shared.length > 0) return true;
        }
        // Same tags
        if (item.suggestions && m.suggestions) {
          var sharedTags = item.suggestions.filter(function(t) { return m.suggestions.includes(t); });
          if (sharedTags.length > 0) return true;
        }
        // Similar colors
        if (item.dominantColor && m.dominantColor) {
          var dist = Math.abs(item.dominantColor.r - m.dominantColor.r) +
                     Math.abs(item.dominantColor.g - m.dominantColor.g) +
                     Math.abs(item.dominantColor.b - m.dominantColor.b);
          if (dist < 100) return true;
        }
        return false;
      });
    }

    function renderStoryFragment(item) {
      var el = document.getElementById('deep-dive-story');
      var story = generateStoryFragment(item);
      el.innerHTML = story;
    }

    function generateStoryFragment(item) {
      var parts = [];
      var date = item.timestamp ? new Date(item.timestamp) : null;

      if (date) {
        var months = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'];
        parts.push('It was <span class="highlight">' + months[date.getMonth()] + ' ' + date.getFullYear() + '</span>');
      } else {
        parts.push('In a <span class="highlight">timeless moment</span>');
      }

      if (item.persons && item.persons.length > 0) {
        parts.push(', when <span class="highlight">' + item.persons.length + ' soul' + (item.persons.length > 1 ? 's' : '') + '</span> came together');
      }

      if (item.suggestions && item.suggestions[0]) {
        parts.push('. The scene whispers of <span class="highlight">' + item.suggestions[0] + '</span>');
      }

      if (item.dominantColor) {
        var temp = getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor);
        if (temp > 0.6) {
          parts.push(', bathed in <span class="highlight">golden warmth</span>');
        } else if (temp < 0.4) {
          parts.push(', wrapped in <span class="highlight">cool serenity</span>');
        }
      }

      if (item.isFavorite) {
        parts.push('. This memory was <span class="highlight">marked as precious</span>');
      }

      if (item.likes > 0) {
        parts.push(', touching <span class="highlight">' + item.likes + ' heart' + (item.likes > 1 ? 's' : '') + '</span> along the way');
      }

      parts.push('.');

      return parts.join('');
    }

    function renderDeepDiveStats(item) {
      var el = document.getElementById('deep-dive-stats');
      el.innerHTML =
        '<div class="dd-stat"><div class="dd-stat-value">' + (item.aiRanking || '—') + '</div><div class="dd-stat-label">AI Rating</div></div>' +
        '<div class="dd-stat"><div class="dd-stat-value">' + (item.likes || 0) + '</div><div class="dd-stat-label">Likes</div></div>' +
        '<div class="dd-stat"><div class="dd-stat-value">' + (item.favoritesCount || 0) + '</div><div class="dd-stat-label">Saves</div></div>' +
        '<div class="dd-stat"><div class="dd-stat-value">' + (item.persons ? item.persons.length : 0) + '</div><div class="dd-stat-label">People</div></div>';
    }

    function renderDeepDiveTimeline() {
      var el = document.getElementById('deep-dive-timeline');
      el.innerHTML = filteredMedia.slice(0, 20).map(function(m, i) {
        return '<div class="timeline-thumb' + (i === deepDiveIndex ? ' active' : '') + '" onclick="navigateDeepDive(' + i + ')">' +
          '<img src="' + (m.midResUrl || m.goodResUrl) + '">' +
        '</div>';
      }).join('');
    }

    function updateTimelineActive() {
      var thumbs = document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-thumb');
      thumbs.forEach(function(t, i) {
        t.classList.toggle('active', i === deepDiveIndex);
      });
    }

    window.navigateDeepDive = function(index) {
      deepDiveIndex = index;
      var item = filteredMedia[deepDiveIndex];
      if (item) renderDeepDive(item);
    };

    function setupDeepDiveEvents() {
      var closeBtn = document.getElementById('deep-dive-close');
      var prevBtn = document.getElementById('deep-dive-prev');
      var nextBtn = document.getElementById('deep-dive-next');
      var modal = document.getElementById('deep-dive-modal');

      closeBtn.onclick = closeDeepDive;
      prevBtn.onclick = function() {
        deepDiveIndex = (deepDiveIndex - 1 + filteredMedia.length) % filteredMedia.length;
        renderDeepDive(filteredMedia[deepDiveIndex]);
      };
      nextBtn.onclick = function() {
        deepDiveIndex = (deepDiveIndex + 1) % filteredMedia.length;
        renderDeepDive(filteredMedia[deepDiveIndex]);
      };

      // Keyboard navigation
      var keyHandler = function(e) {
        if (!deepDiveOpen) return;
        if (e.key === 'Escape') closeDeepDive();
        if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') prevBtn.click();
        if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') nextBtn.click();
      };
      document.addEventListener('keydown', keyHandler);

      // Click backdrop to close
      modal.querySelector('.deep-dive-backdrop').onclick = closeDeepDive;
    }

    // Global function to open deep dive from any mode
    window.openPhotoDeepDive = function(itemOrIndex) {
      var item, index;
      if (typeof itemOrIndex === 'number') {
        index = itemOrIndex;
        item = filteredMedia[index];
      } else {
        item = itemOrIndex;
        index = filteredMedia.indexOf(item);
      }
      openDeepDive(item, index >= 0 ? index : 0);
    };

    // ============================================
    // 1D MODE - RETRO 8-BIT PIXEL ART
    // ============================================

    var is1DMode = false;
    var retroDisplayMode = 'ascii'; // 'ascii' or 'pixel'
    var retroScore = 0;
    var pixelCtx = null;

    var asciiChars = ' .:-=+*#%@';
    var retroStories = [
      "YEAR 20XX... A BRAVE PHOTOGRAPHER CAPTURED THIS MOMENT IN TIME.",
      "THE PIXELS TELL A STORY OF {tags}...",
      "MEMORY FRAGMENT #{id} RECOVERED. QUALITY LEVEL: {rating}/10",
      "{people} HEROES WERE SPOTTED IN THIS LEGENDARY FRAME!",
      "THIS IMAGE HAS EARNED {likes} POWER CRYSTALS FROM ADMIRERS.",
      "AN ANCIENT ARTIFACT FROM {date}. THE COLORS SPEAK OF {mood}.",
      "QUEST LOG: DISCOVERED A {type} OF GREAT IMPORTANCE!",
      "THE ALGORITHM RANKS THIS TREASURE AT LEVEL {rating}!",
    ];

    function enter1DMode() {
      is1DMode = true;
      document.getElementById('retro-container-1d').style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('carousel-container').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('retro-total').textContent = filteredMedia.length;
      initPixelCanvas();
      setup1DControls();
      render1DView();
    }

    function exit1DMode() {
      is1DMode = false;
      document.getElementById('retro-container-1d').style.display = 'none';
    }

    function initPixelCanvas() {
      var canvas = document.getElementById('pixel-canvas');
      if (canvas) {
        canvas.width = 80;
        canvas.height = 60;
        pixelCtx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        pixelCtx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;
      }
    }

    function setup1DControls() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.retro-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
        btn.onclick = function() {
          var action = btn.dataset.action;
          if (action === 'prev') { navigatePrev(); render1DView(); }
          else if (action === 'next') { navigateNext(); render1DView(); retroScore += 10; updateRetroScore(); }
          else if (action === 'ascii') { retroDisplayMode = 'ascii'; render1DView(); }
          else if (action === 'pixel') { retroDisplayMode = 'pixel'; render1DView(); }
          else if (action === 'story') { generateRetroStory(); }
          else if (action === 'dive') { openPhotoDeepDive(currentIndex); }
        };
      });

      // Double-click on retro photo for deep dive
      var retroThumb = document.getElementById('retro-photo-thumb');
      if (retroThumb) {
        retroThumb.addEventListener('dblclick', function() {
          openPhotoDeepDive(currentIndex);
        });
        retroThumb.style.cursor = 'pointer';
        retroThumb.title = 'Double-click for Deep Dive';
      }

      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (!is1DMode) return;
        if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === ' ') { navigateNext(); render1DView(); retroScore += 10; updateRetroScore(); }
        else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') { navigatePrev(); render1DView(); }
        else if (e.key === '1') { retroDisplayMode = 'ascii'; render1DView(); }
        else if (e.key === '2') { retroDisplayMode = 'pixel'; render1DView(); }
        else if (e.key === 'Enter') { openPhotoDeepDive(currentIndex); }
      });
    }

    function render1DView() {
      if (!is1DMode || filteredMedia.length === 0) return;
      var item = filteredMedia[currentIndex];

      document.getElementById('retro-level').textContent = currentIndex + 1;
      updateRetroStats(item);

      // Update the original photo thumbnail
      var thumbImg = document.getElementById('retro-photo-img');
      if (thumbImg) {
        thumbImg.src = item.midResUrl || item.goodResUrl;
      }

      if (retroDisplayMode === 'ascii') {
        document.querySelector('.ascii-frame').classList.remove('hidden');
        document.getElementById('pixel-canvas').classList.remove('active');
        renderAsciiArt(item);
      } else {
        document.querySelector('.ascii-frame').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('pixel-canvas').classList.add('active');
        renderPixelArt(item);
      }

      generateRetroStory();
    }

    function renderAsciiArt(item) {
      var img = new Image();
      img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
      img.onload = function() {
        var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        var w = 80, h = 50;
        canvas.width = w;
        canvas.height = h;
        ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);

        var imgData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h).data;
        var ascii = '';

        for (var y = 0; y < h; y++) {
          for (var x = 0; x < w; x++) {
            var i = (y * w + x) * 4;
            var brightness = (imgData[i] + imgData[i+1] + imgData[i+2]) / 3;
            var charIdx = Math.floor((brightness / 255) * (asciiChars.length - 1));
            ascii += asciiChars[charIdx];
          }
          ascii += '\n';
        }

        document.getElementById('ascii-art').textContent = ascii;
      };
      img.src = item.midResUrl || item.goodResUrl;
    }

    function renderPixelArt(item) {
      if (!pixelCtx) return;
      var img = new Image();
      img.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
      img.onload = function() {
        pixelCtx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, 80, 60);
        // Apply color reduction for 8-bit effect
        var imgData = pixelCtx.getImageData(0, 0, 80, 60);
        var data = imgData.data;
        for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {
          data[i] = Math.round(data[i] / 32) * 32;
          data[i+1] = Math.round(data[i+1] / 32) * 32;
          data[i+2] = Math.round(data[i+2] / 32) * 32;
        }
        pixelCtx.putImageData(imgData, 0, 0);
      };
      img.src = item.midResUrl || item.goodResUrl;
    }

    function generateRetroStory() {
      var item = filteredMedia[currentIndex];
      if (!item) return;

      var template = retroStories[Math.floor(Math.random() * retroStories.length)];
      var story = template
        .replace('{id}', item.id)
        .replace('{tags}', item.suggestions ? item.suggestions.slice(0,2).join(' AND ') : 'MYSTERY')
        .replace('{rating}', item.aiRanking || '?')
        .replace('{people}', item.persons ? item.persons.length : 0)
        .replace('{likes}', item.likes || 0)
        .replace('{date}', item.timestamp ? new Date(item.timestamp).getFullYear() : 'UNKNOWN ERA')
        .replace('{mood}', getColorTemperature(item.dominantColor) > 0.5 ? 'WARMTH' : 'COOLNESS')
        .replace('{type}', item.type === 'videoclip' ? 'MOTION PICTURE' : 'STILL IMAGE');

      typeRetroText(story.toUpperCase());
    }

    function typeRetroText(text) {
      var el = document.getElementById('retro-story');
      el.textContent = '';
      var i = 0;
      function type() {
        if (i < text.length && is1DMode) {
          el.textContent += text[i];
          i++;
          setTimeout(type, 30);
        }
      }
      type();
    }

    function updateRetroStats(item) {
      var rating = item.aiRanking || 5;
      var likes = item.likes || 0;
      var ratingBar = '█'.repeat(rating) + '░'.repeat(10 - rating);
      var popBar = '█'.repeat(Math.min(10, Math.floor(likes / 10))) + '░'.repeat(10 - Math.min(10, Math.floor(likes / 10)));

      document.getElementById('retro-rating').textContent = ratingBar;
      document.getElementById('retro-popularity').textContent = popBar;
      document.getElementById('retro-people').textContent = item.persons ? item.persons.length : 0;
    }

    function updateRetroScore() {
      document.getElementById('retro-score').textContent = retroScore;
    }
  })();
  </script>
